title: The faces of excellence, innovation and inspiration
description: Dr. Lahari Surapaneni: Advancing Excellence in Aesthetic Surgery and Preventive Healthcare LeadershipDr. Lahari Surapaneni is a distinguished plastic and reconstructive surgeon, entrepreneur, and healthcare leader redefining aesthetic and reconstructive surgery standards in India. Serving as Director of Plastic, Reconstructive and Aesthetic Surgery and CEO of Bangalore Hospitals Group, she combines advanced surgical expertise with patient-centered healthcare leadership. Her qualifications include MBBS, MS in General Surgery, MCh in Plastic Surgery, and ECFMG certified, MHA from the USC, placing her among a rare group of globally trained surgeons practicing in India. Recognized for techniques such as Inverse Hybrid Rhinoplasty and scarless endoscopic facelifts, she is known for delivering natural, anatomically balanced outcomes. Beyond surgery, a pioneer in precision medicine, she is building programmes that bring structured, preventive healthcare to patients long before they ever need a surgeon.Mr. Kishor Jagirdar : Transforming Businesses Through Strategic Innovation and LeadershipMr. Kishor Jagirdar  is a visionary business leader and transformation strategist associated with Infopace Management Pvt. Ltd., a Bengaluru-based strategic change management and business transformation firm established in 1999. Under his leadership, Infopace has assisted organizations across sectors including IT, telecom, retail, manufacturing, and services achieve sustainable growth, operational excellence, and digital maturity. The company specializes in Growth Acceleration   Programs, Digital Transformation, Global Capability Center (GCC) establishment, leadership development, and strategic investments. By effectively aligning people, processes, technology, and business objectives, he has enabled enterprises to navigate complex market challenges and accelerate innovation. His commitment to organizational excellence, strategic execution, and future-ready business solutions has positioned Infopace as a trusted partner for companies seeking long-term success, enhanced competitiveness, and transformational growth in an increasingly dynamic global business environment.Mr. Ranjeett Sahu: Driving Industrial Growth Through Visionary Entrepreneurship and Diversified LeadershipRanjeett Sahu is a dynamic entrepreneur and business leader recognized for building and scaling successful ventures across steel, metallurgy, industrial gases, hospitality and luxury jewellery. Alongside a forward-thinking group management team, he has played a pivotal role in driving the growth of RS Virla Group and KRN Alloys Pvt Ltd through a shared vision focused on innovation, operational excellence, and long-term value creation. The group’s management philosophy is built on disciplined execution, technology adoption, customer-centricity, and sustainable growth, enabling businesses within the group to remain competitive in evolving markets. With deep expertise in the steel and metals industry, the leadership team has consistently emphasized modernization, process-driven manufacturing, and efficiency-led expansion. Beyond manufacturing, the group’s successful diversification into hospitality, industrial gas solutions, and bespoke jewelry reflects its entrepreneurial mindset, strategic adaptability, and strong business foresight. Known for collaborative leadership and progressive thinking, Ranjeett Sahu and the group management continue to foster innovation, strengthen enterprises, and contribute meaningfully to the future of Indian industry and business.https://www.rsvirla.comVijay Kumar Amar: A Lifetime of Excellence in Infrastructure Engineering and Public ServiceVijay Kumar Amar is a distinguished civil and infrastructure engineering professional with over five decades of experience in highways, bridges, urban development, arbitration, and sustainable infrastructure management. Holding qualifications including B.E., M.Tech. (India), PG Diploma (USA), PG Diploma (UK), MBA, LL.B., and an Honorary Doctorate, he has led major projects funded by the World Bank, ADB, HUDCO, and NHAI. As Chief Engineer of the Madhya Pradesh Public Works Department, he supervised over 4,000 kilometers of national highways and contributed significantly to Bhopal’s urban modernization. He has also served as an arbitrator and dispute resolution expert for infrastructure projects across India. His outstanding contributions earned him Gold Medals from both the President of India and the President of Sri Lanka, recognizing his technical excellence, leadership, and commitment to sustainable infrastructure development.Aripirala Yogananda Sastry: A Young Prodigy in Astrology and VastuAripirala Yogananda Sastry, a 13-year-old prodigy from Guntur, Andhra Pradesh, has distinguished himself as an extraordinary talent in the fields of Astrology and Vastu. Recognized among the youngest achievers to receive a doctorate in these disciplines, he has gained national and international recognition for his exceptional understanding of Vedic sciences. His remarkable journey has been celebrated by multiple record organizations, and he has earned over 275 prestigious awards and honors. His achievements have received appreciation from Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Defence Minister Rajnath Singh, while he has also been felicitated by governors, ministers, judges, spiritual leaders, and eminent personalities. Through his dedication, discipline, and passion for preserving India’s ancient wisdom, Yogananda Sastry continues to inspire the younger generation.Mr. Nitin Kumar: Driving Enterprise AI from Innovation to Scalable Business ImpactNitin Kumar, Chief Technology Officer at LiftLab, is among the emerging enterprise AI leaders shaping how businesses operationalize intelligence at scale. With over 18 years of experience across consulting, product innovation, and enterprise technology, he has built a reputation for transforming AI from experimental models into systems that drive measurable business decisions. At LiftLab, he leads the architecture and engineering strategy behind a next-generation decision intelligence platform designed for real-world enterprise deployment. Previously, he scaled C5i’s AI practice into a global team of researchers and engineers, built deep learning capabilities at EY for banking and risk systems, and conceptualized the AI product that evolved into Incivus. His work sits at the intersection of AI architecture, operational strategy, and scalable enterprise execution.Dr. Krishna Kodey: Revolutionizing Human Connection Through AI-Powered Digital PresenceDr. Krishna Kodey Drug Safety Specialist, entrepreneur, and innovator, is redefining the role of artificial intelligence in addressing one of society’s most pressing challenges,loneliness. Inspired by the loss of his grandparents at a young age and years of caring for elderly patients in Toronto, Canada, he envisioned a technology that could preserve human connection beyond physical absence. His answer is VLA(Virtual Loved Assist, Series-1) From iAVATARS, a Michigan-based startup set to launch in late 2026. Powered by the proprietary iSoul 1.0 platform, iAVATARS enables meaningful conversations with lifelike digital representations of loved ones, preserving their voice, personality, and memories. More than a chat-bot or application, it offers an emotional presence within the home. With patents pending across three major countries, Dr. Kodey’s innovation is pioneering a new era of AI-driven human companionship and emotional well being.Dr. Anirudh Gupta: Redefining Education Through Visionary LeadershipDr. Anirudh Gupta is India’s most influential Edupreneur, Philanthropist, Author, Angel Investor & Social Impact Leader whose contributions have reshaped modern education. As CEO of DCM Group of Schools, established in 1946, he leads innovation, technology integration and experiential learning, positioning DCM as a benchmark for future-ready education. A globally recognized thought leader, Dr. Gupta has represented India at  international eduforums, sharing insights on innovation, leadership, emerging technologies and the future of learning. He holds leadership roles in  NISA, ISFI, CII and PHD Chamber of Commerce. Recipient of several national and international honours, including Education Icon of the Year consecutively, he continues to drive educational transformation, youth empowerment and social impact by building avant-garde institutions, shaping the future of education.Dr. Vedala Srinivas (Hon): A Visionary Leader in Spirituality, Business, Cinema and Social Service Dr. Vedala Srinivas (Hon) is a distinguished Clairvoyant, Film Producer, Merchant Exporter and Philanthropist whose remarkable journey reflects excellence across Spirituality, Business, Creative Arts and Social Service. Widely respected for his intuitive guidance, visionary leadership and commitment to uplifting society, he has positively influenced individuals and professionals both in India and internationally. As the Founder of Sri Mandiram Productions and Srimandiram Traders and Services, he has successfully blended entrepreneurship with innovation, quality, integrity and ethical business practices.Beyond his professional accomplishments, he actively supports community welfare, cultural preservation, humanitarian initiatives and educational empowerment. Driven by a strong sense of purpose, service and responsibility Dr. Vedala Srinivas (Hon) continues to inspire positive transformation through his dedication to personal growth, social development,spiritual values and nation-building efforts.www.vedalasrinivas.com    www.srimandiramexports.comMr. Umesh Malik: Driving Excellence Through Strategic Procurement LeadershipUmesh Malik is a distinguished procurement leader and currently serves as Vice President with one of India’s largest integrated energy and materials organizations. With over three decades of experience, he has been instrumental in transforming procurement into a strategic driver of business value and organizational growth. A Mechanical Engineering graduate with postgraduate qualifications in Business Administration, he combines technical expertise with visionary leadership. Passionate about nurturing future-ready professionals, he has championed competency-based learning, capability transformation, and leadership development throughout his career. Backed by globally recognized certifications and experience as a certified leadership assessor, Umesh Malik continues to inspire through his commitment to excellence, continuous learning, and impactful leadership.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: Nehal Mota champions a holistic approach to financial fitness through Finnovate
description: As conversations around personal finance increasingly move beyond investments and returns, a growing number of financial professionals are advocating for a more comprehensive approach to managing money. Among them is Nehal Mota, Co-Founder of Finnovate, who has spent nearly two decades promoting financial fitness as a long-term discipline rather than a short-term pursuit of wealth creation.Founded in 2007 by Nehal Mota and Naveen Singh, Finnovate was established with the objective of helping individuals and families make informed financial decisions through structured planning. Over the years, the firm has worked with thousands of families across India, focusing on goal-based financial strategies designed to align with different life stages and aspirations.Mota's approach stems from the belief that financial well-being cannot be measured solely through investment performance. Instead, she advocates a broader framework that encompasses multiple aspects of personal finance, including cash flow management, risk protection, wealth creation, retirement preparedness, estate planning, and financial goal setting.This philosophy led to the development of a financial fitness model that seeks to bring clarity and discipline to the way people manage their finances. Rather than emphasizing products, the model focuses on creating long-term financial habits and decision-making frameworks that can help individuals navigate changing economic circumstances.Under Mota's leadership, Finnovate adopted a hybrid advisory structure that combines technology with human expertise. The model aims to provide personalized financial guidance that is structured and purposeful, while maintaining transparency and consistency throughout the planning process.According to Mota, financial planning should remain unbiased and aligned with the interests of clients. “My main objective with Finnovate was to build a fiduciary advisory model that remains unbiased, product-agnostic, and deeply personalized. We believe financial planning should empower families to make confident decisions and unlock their true financial potential,” she said.As financial literacy continues to gain prominence across India, Mota remains focused on encouraging individuals to view financial planning as an ongoing journey rather than a one-time activity. Her work reflects a growing shift within the industry toward holistic financial wellness, where long-term security and life goals take precedence over short-term market outcomes.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: Antibiotic "megacluster" discovery provides new strategy to fight superbugs
description: It's "an exciting advance in efforts to restock the antibiotic arsenal."
content:
Antibiotic resistance has loomed over humans since the moment we started using antibiotics. In the 20th century, the drugs downgraded potentially life-threatening bacterial infections to mere inconveniences—a miracle of modern medicine it seemed. But the drugs aren't really a human invention; we mostly swiped them from microbes, which have been locked in arms races with each other for centuries. Microbial evolution has crafted both deadly molecules and clever tricks to dodge death as the wee organisms endlessly battle over turf and resources. More than 80 percent of the antibiotics used in clinics today are based on those turf-war weapons, which scientists refer to as "natural products."
For decades, humans mined antibiotic molecules from microbes and tweaked them to develop new drugs, staying ahead of evolution's cunning countermeasures. But in recent times, new natural products have been harder to find, and the pipeline of new antibiotics has slowed to a trickle. Meanwhile, existing antibiotics have been overused, and resistance has mounted to critical levels. Most antibiotics are single bioactive molecules, and some can be thwarted with single mutations. While the current situation is dire, a study in Nature this week reports a compelling discovery that not only points to a potentially new antibiotic regimen, but also an entirely new strategy to once again get ahead in the microbial arms race.
Exciting find
The study, led by biomedical researcher Eric Brown at McMaster University in Ontario, Canada, reports the discovery of a large block of genes—dubbed a "megacluster"—that codes for four molecules that appear to work in concert to derail a single essential metabolic pathway.Read full article

title: महासमुंद पुलिस की बड़ी कार्रवाई: 51 किलो गांजे के साथ अंतरराज्यीय तस्कर गिरफ्तार, 30 लाख की संपत्ति जब्त
description: Chhattisgarh Crime News: छत्तीसगढ़ के महासमुंद में पुलिस ने 51 किलो गांजे के साथ एक तस्कर को पकड़ा। भुवनेश्वर से कानपुर ले जाई जा रही थी खेप, 30.60 लाख की संपत्ति जब्त। SIT जांच जारी।
content:
Mahasamund Police Arrested An Interstate Smuggler: छत्तीसगढ़ की महासमुंद पुलिस ने नशे के खिलाफ चलाए जा रहे अभियान के तहत बड़ी कार्रवाई करते हुए एक अंतरराज्यीय ड्रग तस्कर को गिरफ्तार किया है। पुलिस ने ओडिशा के भुवनेश्वर से उत्तर प्रदेश के कानपुर ले जाए जा रहे 51 किलोग्राम गांजे की खेप बरामद की है, जिसकी अनुमानित कीमत 25.50 लाख रुपये बताई जा रही है।
इस कार्रवाई के दौरान गांजा तस्करी में इस्तेमाल की जा रही कार और मोबाइल फोन सहित कुल 30.60 लाख रुपये की संपत्ति जब्त की गई है। पुलिस को गुप्त सूचना मिलने के बाद एनएच-53 पर नाकेबंदी कर यह कार्रवाई की गई। हालांकि, पुलिस को देखकर एक आरोपी मौके से फरार हो गया, जिसकी तलाश जारी है। गिरफ्तार आरोपी उत्तर प्रदेश का रहने वाला है। पुलिस पूरे नेटवर्क की जांच कर रही है और मामले में आगे की कार्रवाई की जा रही है।
यूपी का निवासी निकला गिरफ्तार तस्कर
आपको बता दें कि महासमुंद पुलिस ने तस्करों के खिलाफ कार्रवाई करते हुए एक कार, मोबाइल फोन सहित 5 लाख 10 हजार रुपए की कीमती संपत्ति जब्त की है। गिरफ्तार आरोपी उत्तर प्रदेश का निवासी है। महासमुंद पुलिस को गांजा तस्कर को पकड़ने में यह सफलता सटीक सूचना एवं त्वरित कार्रवाई से मिली है, हालांकि पुलिस को देखकर गांजा तस्कर ने भागने का प्रयास किया था।
गुप्त सूचना पर एनएच-53 पर की गई नाकेबंदी
दरअसल, एंटी नारकोटिक्स टास्क फोर्स (एएनटीएफ) द्वारा अवैध मादक पदार्थ गांजा की तस्करी, परिवहन तथा बिक्री, इंड-टू-इंड इन्वेस्टिगेशन और वित्तीय जांच पर प्रभावी एवं विधिवत कार्रवाई करने के लिए निर्देश प्राप्त हुआ था, जिसके परिपालन में जिले में पुलिस के द्वारा लगातार चेकिंग कार्रवाई की जा रही है।
भुवनेश्वर से कानपुर लेकर जा रहा था मादक पदार्थ
इसी दरमियान महासमुंद पुलिस को सूचना मिली कि एक कार में ओडिशा की ओर से अवैध मादक पदार्थ गांजा लेकर छत्तीसगढ की ओर आ रहा है। प्राप्त सूचना से एनएच 53 रोड रेहटीखोल में नाकाबंदी की गई। कुछ समय बाद एक मारुति सुजुकी कार आई, जिसे रोका गया, तभी ड्राइवर के साथ बैठा दूसरा व्यक्ति वाहन से उतरकर जंगल की ओर भाग निकला।
पुलिस पूछताछ में कार चालक ने अपना नाम आलोक कुमार चौहान (32 वर्ष) तथा फरार व्यक्ति का नाम संजीव कुमार बताया। आरोपी से पूछताछ करने पर पता चला कि गाड़ी की बीच वाली सीट पर रखे तीन प्लास्टिक के बोरों में गांजा रखा हुआ था। उसने बताया कि वह इसे बेचने के लिए भुवनेश्वर से कानपुर ले जा रहा था।
ये भी पढ़ें-  मप्र-छग के बीच 26 साल पुराना DR विवाद सुलझाने की पहल, मध्य प्रदेश ने भेजा ‘स्थायी सहमति’ का प्रस्ताव
अंतरराज्यीय ड्रग नेटवर्क की जांच में जुटी पुलिस
गिरफ्तार आरोपी की पहचान आलोक कुमार चौहान (32 वर्ष, साकिन नेगवा खिरिया थाना किशनी, जिला मैनपुरी, यूपी) के रूप में हुई है। फरार आरोपी संजीव कुमार जो (आर जेड 69 एच-हरिजन बस्ती वेस्टसागरपुर, दक्षिण पश्चिम दिल्ली) का रहने वाला है, जिसकी तलाश जारी है।
पुलिस द्वारा की गई जब्ती में 51 किलो गांजा (कीमत 25,50,000 रुपए), एक कार (कीमत 5,00,000 रुपए) और एक मोबाइल (कीमती 10,000 रुपए) शामिल हैं। इन सभी जब्त संपत्तियों की कीमत लगभग 30,60,000 रुपए है। वहीं, आरोपी को गिरफ्तार कर उसके खिलाफ कार्रवाई की जा रही है।

title: 'Unfortunately, no': Shreyas Iyer confirms Vaibhav Sooryavanshi will have to wait for India debut
description: Young batting prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi will have to wait for his historic India debut. Captain Shreyas Iyer confirmed the 15-year-old was not in the playing XI for the first T20I against Ireland, citing team balance. Despite the delay, Sooryavanshi, who had a stellar IPL and India A season, remains on the cusp of becoming India's youngest international cricketer.
content: NEW DELHI: The wait for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's historic India debut will continue after newly-appointed captain Shreyas Iyer confirmed that the 15-year-old batting sensation was not included in the playing XI for the opening T20I against Ireland in Belfast on Friday.Sooryavanshi had been widely tipped to make his maiden international appearance after a stunning rise through the ranks. Had he featured, the teenager would have become the youngest player ever to represent India in men's international cricket, eclipsing Sachin Tendulkar's 37-year-old record.At the toss, however, Iyer ended the speculation before explaining that the decision was driven by team balance rather than the youngster's readiness."Going to field first. It's a new surface for us, first time in Belfast. Considering the conditions, the environment and the wicket, want to field first. Need to get accustomed to the conditions as quickly as possible. We're going to take one match at a time. Always keep saying that you don't have to complicate things," Iyer said.When asked whether Sooryavanshi would make his debut, the skipper replied: "Unfortunately, no."He then reassured fans that the teenager remains firmly in India's plans."He'll (Sooryavanshi) get his opportunity when the time comes. For now we're going with three genuine seamers, one all-rounder," Iyer added.Teen prodigy remains on the brink of historyAlthough he missed out on his first cap, Sooryavanshi remains on the verge of rewriting Indian cricket history. Whenever he makes his international debut, the left-hander will become India's youngest-ever men's international cricketer, surpassing Sachin Tendulkar, who was 16 years and 205 days old when he debuted against Pakistan in 1989.The Bihar youngster earned his maiden senior call-up after a sensational IPL 2026 campaign with Rajasthan Royals, where he finished as the tournament's leading run-scorer with 776 runs in 16 innings at a breathtaking strike rate of 237.30. He also smashed a record 72 sixes, the most by any batter in a single IPL season.The teenager carried that form into the India A tri-series in Sri Lanka, blasting 94 off just 29 balls in the final against Sri Lanka A, an innings that included the fastest fifty in List A cricket history as he reached the milestone in just 11 deliveries.Dream deferred, not deniedSpeaking after receiving his maiden India call-up, Sooryavanshi had described wearing the India jersey as the fulfilment of a lifelong dream."Words cannot explain it. The reason I picked up the bat from day one and went to the ground for practice: that dream is fulfilled now. The biggest step in that journey was completed today," he had said in a BCCI video."I felt like I was dreaming when I saw that T-shirt. I couldn't stop smiling. Sometimes things happen that you never imagined could happen."While Indian fans will have to wait a little longer to see the teenage sensation on the international stage, Iyer's comments made it clear that the omission is only temporary.

title: The Opening Finals 2026: Live Updates from Day 2
description: The Opening Finals is officially back following a six-year hiatus. The Nike Football event gets underway on Thursday from Beaverton, Oregon and will run through Friday. More than 100 prospects across the 2027, 2028 and 2029 recruiting cycles are in attendance this week at the Philip H. Knight Campus. Prospects earned invites to the finals […]
content: The Opening Finals is officially back following a six-year hiatus. The Nike Football event gets underway on Thursday from Beaverton, Oregon and will run through Friday.More than 100 prospects across the 2027, 2028 and 2029 recruiting cycles are in attendance this week at the Philip H. Knight Campus. Prospects earned invites to the finals after competing in regional events across seven cities this spring and summer.Some of the program’s prominent alumni include 2024 NFL Defensive Player of the Year Patrick Surtain II, two-time All-Pro receiver Ja’Marr Chase, reigning Offensive Player of the Year Saquon Barkley, and two-time NFL rushing yards leader Derrick Henry.FULL OPENING FINALS ROSTER | OPENING FINALS PREVIEWFriday’s action will feature a 7-on-7 tournament, culminating in a championship match in the afternoon. Rivals National Scout Cody Bellaire, as well as Rivals national experts Greg Biggins, Brandon Huffman and Sam Spiegelman are all on hand this week and will provide analysis throughout the first session.Join the discussion on the Rivals recruiting board here.Opening Finals Day 2 Updates10:32 a.m. PT: Warren to Jaxon Dollar for a TD. Northeast up on the South 12-0. — Greg Biggins10:31 a.m. PT:Kentucky defensive back commit Tristin Hughes has been exceptional throughout the week in OregonAnother interception Friday morning adds to his total of three so far in this tournament. — Sam Spiegelman10:30 a.m. PT: Tristin Hughes continues to be disruptive for opposing offenses. title: Atletico Madrid star tells Barcelona target to chase his dream – ‘It’s a personal matter’
description: The Julian Alvarez-to-Barcelona saga has been all over the news in the past couple of days after his public declaration asking to leave Atletico Madrid this summer.Alex Baena has offered his view on t...
content: Atletico Madrid star tells Barcelona target to chase his dream – ‘It’s a personal matter’The Julian Alvarez-to-Barcelona saga has been all over the news in the past couple of days after his public declaration asking to leave Atletico Madrid this summer.Alex Baena has offered his view on the situation, speaking about Alvarez and revealing what he thinks the Argentine forward should be doing.The Atletico midfielder was asked about Alvarez’s situation, including the claim that Atletico have already filed a complaint against Barcelona with FIFA.During an interview with COPE, Baena seemed surprised by that development and answered:“Really? I had no idea.. This is the first time I’ve heard about it.”It is highly unlikely that the Spaniard did not know what was going on, but he may have chosen to give this answer to avoid being dragged into the mix.Alvarez wants to join Barcelona. (Photo by Fran Santiago/Getty Images)Publicly, Atletico are angry, Barcelona are being accused of pushing the player, and Alvarez’s future has become one of the biggest transfer stories of the summer.Baena understands the dreamAsked whether Alvarez’s comments surprised him, Baena admitted they did. He said:“Yes, a little, because I wasn’t expecting a statement like that from a teammate, but it’s a personal matter.”He then added: “Maybe I wouldn’t have done it that way; I would have done it differently, but it’s a personal matter, and if that’s really his dream, I’d tell him to go after it.”This is not Baena pushing Alvarez towards Barça. However, he says that he would understand if the Argentine wanted to choose that path for his career.Baena made his own position clear too:“As for me, I’ll stay at Atletico Madrid, and that’s really what I want.”Barça still need patienceThe most important part for Barcelona is that this saga is not going to be easy.Alvarez’s dream may be the Camp Nou, but Atletico remain in control of the contract and are determined not to make the Barcelona route easy.Atletico do not wish to sell Alvarez. (Photo by Rodrigo Valle/Getty Images)Baena was also asked whether clubs should make it easier when a player wants to leave. He answered:“We players never stop being people who have to carry out decisions.”He continued: “If Atletico doesn’t want to sell him, he’ll have to accept the decision, but this isn’t the time to talk about it; after the World Cup, they’ll certainly sit down to discuss it.”Alvarez can push, Barça can wait, and Atletico can resist. Eventually, the real conversation will come after the World Cup.Baena’s comments highlight the growing uncertainty in modern football and show that he is willing to accept his teammate’s decision.It remains to be seen whether Alvarez is eventually wearing the Blaugrana shirt next season.

title: Four-time Super Bowl champion OT leads Steelers 2026 countdown to kickoff: Day No. 79
description: The Pittsburgh Steelers are 79 days away from their 2026 NFL season opener, and here’s a look at which players wore No. 79 best.
content: The Pittsburgh Steelers' countdown to kickoff is full steam ahead for the 2026 NFL regular season, with fans needing to wait only 79 more days until the Steel City brand of football returns when the Steelers host the Atlanta Falcons on September 13.In the spirit of the countdown, we at Steelers Wire will take a look at the history of the No. 79 jersey and analyze which players wore it best.Steelers current No. 79: G Steven JonesEntering the league as an undrafted free agent in 2024, Jones is the current No. 79 wearer on the Steelers roster. He has yet to make his NFL debut and faces an uphill battle for a roster spot.Last five Steelers to wear No. 79Steven Jones, 2025-2026Jacob Slade, 2024Renell Wren, 2022Rashaad Coward, 2021Javon Hargrave, 2016-2019Best No. 79 in Steelers history: TE/OT Larry BrownThe Steelers' legendary dynasty during the 1970s produced another top jersey wearer, as the title of the greatest No. 79 in franchise history belongs to Larry Brown.Brown, selected by the Steelers with the 106th overall pick in the fifth round of the 1971 NFL Draft, began his NFL career as a blocking tight end. Brown caught one of the most important passes in Steelers history, the first and only touchdown of the team's first Super Bowl championship. During the first six years of his career, Brown recorded 636 receiving yards and five touchdowns before switching to offensive tackle in 1977. He played eight more seasons at right tackle and was named to a Pro Bowl in 1982.A member of the Pittsburgh Steelers All-Time Team and Hall of Honor, Brown is more than deserving of being recognized as the best No. 79 in franchise history.For up-to-date Steelers coverage, including any offseason moves, follow us on X @TheSteelersWire and give our Facebook page a like.This article originally appeared on Steelers Wire: Four-time Super Bowl champion OT leads Steelers 2026 countdown to kickoff: Day No. 79

title: Australia eye 'something special' after reaching World Cup last 32
description: Coach Tony Popovic said Australia want to do "something special" after reaching the World Cup knockout rounds for only the third time in their history."I'd like to think that we dominated the game in a crucial World Cup qualifier with a very young squad in the third match when everything's on the line.
content: Australia fans celebrate in Sydney (DAVID GRAY)Coach Tony Popovic said Australia want to do "something special" after reaching the World Cup knockout rounds for only the third time in their history.The Socceroos played out a 0-0 draw on Thursday with Paraguay in Santa Clara in a stalemate that suited both teams.Australia, who stunned Turkey in their opening match before losing to co-hosts the United States, qualified for the last 32 as runners-up in Group D.Next they play at the air-conditioned home of the Dallas Cowboys on July 3 against the side that finishes second in Group G.That group, which is yet to be finalised, comprises Egypt, Iran, Belgium and regional rivals New Zealand."It's a special day, we've seen already how many big nations have not gone through," Popovic told reporters."I'd like to think that we dominated the game in a crucial World Cup qualifier with a very young squad in the third match when everything's on the line."The players showed composure, patience, quality, and resilience."We'll now go to Dallas and try and do something special."Popovic named a young side and they delivered a gritty display in northern California to get the Socceroos over the line in an uneventful match.Popovic, a former Crystal Palace defender, reserved particular praise for 18-year-old Lucas Herrington.The central defender, Australia's youngest starter at a men's World Cup, has been linked with a move to Barcelona."He is a special talent," Popovic said of the teenager, who plays in Major League Soccer."It's why he was selected in the squad, not to just make up the numbers, and again entrusted this talented young man in the most important game of the three," Popovic added."He was ready to play. He's probably frustrated he didn't get minutes against the US, which I love to see."Today he was outstanding."Australia now have a week to prepare for the last 32, and Popovic said the break could be crucial if they want to extend their stay in North America."We're delighted to have this break," he said."We have a good plan in place to have all players that are fit, ready and able to produce a big performance that might give us a chance to progress even further."pst/nf

title: Duckett & Stokes haul England back into third Test
description: Ben Duckett’s scintillating century builds on an inspirational spell from Ben Stokes to haul England back into the decisive third Test against New Zealand at Trent Bridge.
content: Third Rothesay Test, Trent Bridge (day two of five)New Zealand 438: Conway 157, Latham 151; Stokes 4-70England xxx-x: Duckett 113, Bethell 74*England are 215 runs behindScorecardBen Duckett's scintillating century built on an inspirational spell from Ben Stokes to haul England back into the decisive third Test against New Zealand at Trent Bridge.In a remarkable turnaround from the Black Caps reaching 317-0 on the opening day, England took all 10 wickets for 121 runs to dismiss the tourists for 438, then closed the second day on 223-2 - 215 behind.Captain Stokes, back in the side after the nightclub controversy that led him to miss the second Test, was the catalyst with a typically tireless stint in the sweltering heat.After England failed to take a wicket in the first 40 minutes, Stokes' eight overs yielded three wickets and a dropped catch.Shoaib Bashir took two in an over and Jofra Archer one, as well as striking Blair Tickner with a blow that eventually ruled the seamer out of the match with concussion. Overall, from their overnight 361-4, New Zealand lost six wickets for 77 runs on Friday.Given the conditions and the flat pitch it was a superb effort from England, who set about cutting the deficit despite the loss of Emilio Gay for a duck.With the support of Jacob Bethell, Duckett ended a tough year on and off the field with his first Test hundred since last June.New Zealand were almost powerless to prevent England's rapid progress, as the second-wicket pair added 179.Duckett was eventually out for 113, leaving Bethell to move to an unbeaten 74 - his first half-century at home and in the first innings of a Test. Joe Root, at one of his most fruitful venues, is 21 not out.England spirit brings memories of 2022England have endured a torrid eight months. If this series decider goes against them, it will rekindle scrutiny on those in managerial positions.Given their poor run of results - two wins in nine - and faced with the task of dislodging the Kiwis on the road-like pitch and in extreme temperatures, England could have crumbled.That they hung in this game - first with two wickets with the final two balls of day one, then by dominating the second day - is to their immense credit.The home side are still a long way behind, so have plenty of work to do with the bat, but it could be argued England have the best chance of forcing a win simply because they have the earliest opportunity to take 20 wickets.They have history on this ground and against these opponents, with this match plotting a similar course to England's memorable win in 2022, achieved despite New Zealand posting 553 in their first innings.That was the Test that ignited England's Bazball philosophy. Another win here may ease the pressure on the leadership, at least temporarily.Get cricket news sent straight to your phone

title: AFC Wimbledon appoint Morrison as First Team coach
description: Michael Morrison is appointed as AFC Wimbledon first-team coach after retiring from playing at the end of last season.
content: Morrison's playing career of over 600 EFL appearances ended with Cambridge United winning promotion into League One in 2025-2026 [Getty Images]AFC Wimbledon have appointed Michael Morrison as first-team coach.The 38-year-old former centre-half played played more than 750 games for seven clubs, including Charlton and Birmingham. He lifted the League One title with both Reading and Charlton and helped Cambridge to promotion from League Two last season before announcing his retirement from playing.Morrison told the Dons' website: "I always wanted to move into coaching when my career as a player finished. Wimbledon is a club which is greatly connected from the fans right through to what you see on the pitch."Wimbledon manager Johnnie Jackson added: "Michael is an exciting young coach, who is really keen to make his mark on the coaching side of football. He has vast experience in the EFL and was captain at the majority of clubs that he played for."

title: Mercedes' Antonelli tops Friday practice in Austria
description: Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli heads McLaren's Oscar Piastri in Friday practice at the Austrian Grand Prix.
content: Kimi Antonelli leads Lewis Hamilton in the drivers' championship by 41 points  [Getty Images]Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli headed McLaren's Oscar Piastri in Friday practice at the Austrian Grand Prix.Antonelli, who leads Ferrari's Lewis Hamilton by 41 points in the world championship, was 0.237 seconds clear of Australian Piastri.The second McLaren of world champion Lando Norris was third fastest, ahead of Red Bull's Max Verstappen, with Hamilton in fifth and the second Mercedes of George Russell in sixth position.McLaren also looked competitive on race pace, with Norris mixing it with the Mercedes for the best pace on the long runs late in the session.Russell, the only Mercedes driver to speak to the media on Friday, said: "It was a real surprise to see the first lap of the McLarens in P2 right at the top and their race pace, especially on Lando's side, looked a bit better than us."Friday practice results Austrian GP declared heat-hazard race amid heatwaveHow to follow Austrian Grand Prix on the BBCAndrew Benson Q&A: Send us your questionsNorris missed most of the first session because of a hydraulic leak, but Piastri ended it third behind the Mercedes, just 0.117secs off Antonelli's fastest time.But Piastri cautioned that Antonelli probably had more potential than was obvious from the headline times, as his fastest lap in the second session was set on his second attempt on his set of soft tyres, when they would have been past their best.Piastri said: "We are a step behind Mercedes, or at least Kimi, which we expected. For Kimi to do that kind of time on his second lap on the soft is quite impressive."And McLaren technical director applied engineering Neil Houldey said: "The Mercedes, and especially Kimi are going to be very difficult to beat."Ferrari have an engine upgrade for this weekend that they hope will reduce their power deficit to Mercedes to follow on from the aerodynamic developments introduced in Barcelona two weeks ago, when Hamilton took his first win for the team.But they had a low-key day, not yet showing the pace that led to Hamilton's landmark victory.Hamilton was 0.597secs off the pace, and team-mate Charles Leclerc a further 0.244secs adrift in eight place, behind the second Red Bull of Isack Hadjar.Mercedes suspected Ferrari were running their new engine conservatively and would be in the fight at the front come qualifying.But Ferrari team principal Frederic Vasseur downplayed the effect of the upgrade, given it is being introduced only two weeks or so after governing body the FIA confirmed the team would be permitted to change the engine under the additional development and upgrade opportunities (Aduo) programme."It was a tough Friday that we struggled a little but with the conditions, a bit extreme, the altitude, the temperature," Vasseur said."It is the same for everyone but it is not suiting very well to us."We have the night to correct to put everything together and let's try to do a better job on Saturday. So far we are far away from our potential."We knew about Aduo two weeks ago, you cannot expect to have a huge step forward. It is a new engine for sure but it is not a decent step."Ferrari are second in the constructors' standings, 72 points behind leaders Mercedes [Getty Images]Russell was lacking pace over one lap - 0.623secs off team-mate Antonelli - but was on pace on the race-simulation runs.Red Bull have a major upgrade on their car this weekend and Verstappen was 0.55secs off the pace, he and team-mate Hadjar complaining of a lack of grip.Hadjar said: "It's not a completely different car. It feels like the usual. We still have work to do to catch up."For some reason we were quite slow to get started, the car comes alive sometimes in qualifying. We need to get it sorted because it's quite tough."We are struggling with grip. It's a speed range we've been good at so to have this behaviour from the car, I don't understand."At the back, there was a difficult day Cadillac continued when Sergio Perez stopped early on with the same electronics problems he had in the first session, while team-mate Valtteri Bottas had to abandon the session halfway through with sparks flying from the underside of the car.

title: Burqa, Dupatta Allowed But Not Above Neck: MSCE Releases Maharashtra TET Dress Code, Exam Day Guidelines
description: The Maharashtra State Council of Examination has issued MAHA TET 2026 exam day guidelines, detailing the dress code, permitted items, valid identity proofs, OMR instructions and reporting requirements ahead of the June 28 examination.
content: The Maharashtra State Council Of Examination (MSCE) has released the exam day guidelines for the Maharashtra Teacher Eligibility Test (TET) 2026, which is scheduled to be conducted on June 28. Along with the exam day guidelines, MSCE has also released the dress code, which states that while female candidates are free to wear any clothing, no cloth should cover the ears, head, face or mouth above the neck.This decision has been taken to ensure that every candidate's face is clearly is visible on the CCTV. "Female candidates are free to wear any clothing, including dupattas, shawls or burqas. However, during the examination, no cloth should cover the ears, head, face or mouth above the neck, so that candidates' faces remain clearly visible on the live CCTV feed," an official notification from the Council stated.In addition to this, the Council has also stated that shoes and socks are not permitted inside the examination hall. Candidates should wear open footwear such as slippers or sandals. The Council has also reiterated that bags, pouches, purses, notes, books, writing pads or any other unauthorised material are strictly prohibited. Candidates will only be allowed to carry printed admit card, black or blue ballpoint pen, original valid photo ID, photocopy of the original ID, and transparent water bottle.Candidates should also remember that entry will not be permitted without the admit card and at least one original valid ID along with a photocopy of the same. Candidates must carry one original valid photo identity proof from the following:Aadhaar CardVoter IDPassportPAN CardSmart Card Driving LicenceHowever, only photocopies, colour xeroxes or any other substitute for the original ID will not be accepted. The Council has also stated that the photocopy of the ID should clearly display the candidate's photograph and details. "Candidates carrying e-Aadhaar must ensure it contains their name, address, gender, photograph, date of birth, Aadhaar generation date and Aadhaar download date. It must be a clear colour printout," the official notification stated.Candidates registered for Paper I and Paper II will receive two separate admit cards, and each paper will have a different seat number.OMR Answer Sheet InstructionsCandidates should verify that they have received the correct OMR answer sheet bearing their seat number. Only a black or blue ballpoint pen should be used.Correctly fill in the Question Paper Set Code (A/B/C/D) on the OMR sheet and darken the corresponding circle.Mark answers exactly as instructed. Incomplete shading, overwriting, corrections or marking two options for the same question will not be evaluated.Only one option is correct for each question. Once marked, an answer cannot be changed. Do not use erasers, blades or whitener.At the end of the examination, candidates must record the number of attempted and unattempted questions in the designated boxes on the OMR sheet.After the exam, candidates must submit the original OMR sheet to the invigilator, retain the carbon copy (third copy), sign the attendance sheet and leave the hall only after the invigilator's instructions.Candidates must not write answers on the question paper or tear any page from it.Maharashtra TET (MAHA TET) is the Maharashtra Teacher Eligibility Test, a state-level eligibility examination conducted by the Maharashtra State Council of Examination (MSCE), Pune. The examination is scheduled for June 28, 2026.     Maha Tet 2026  by  deekshateri  It consists of two papers—Paper I for candidates aspiring to teach Classes 1 to 5 (Primary level) and Paper II for those seeking to teach Classes 6 to 8 (Upper Primary level). Each paper comprises 150 multiple-choice questions carrying 150 marks, with a duration of 2 hours and 30 minutes and no negative marking. The syllabus includes Child Development and Pedagogy, Language I, Language II, Mathematics, and Environmental Studies (for Paper I), while Paper II includes Mathematics and Science or Social Studies, depending on the candidate's teaching preference.

title: Ravens CB Nate Wiggins healthy after offseason surgery, expects to be "the full Nate" this season
description: Ravens cornerback Nate Wiggins has set some big goals for his third NFL season.
content: Ravens cornerback Nate Wiggins has set some big goals for his third NFL season. During an appearance on The Journey, Wiggins listed All-Pro and Pro Bowl selections along with a Super Bowl title as his hopes for the 2026 campaign. Being at full strength would help his bid to reach any or all of those goals and Wiggins shared good news on that front as well. Wiggins had undisclosed surgery earlier this offseason and said that he played the last two seasons at "about 60-70 percent" health. He said he feels that no one has seen "the full Nate" yet, but feels that's coming now that he's addressed his injury. "They're going to see a big transition this year," Wiggins said. "How I move, all that. . . . I'm just so happy going into this year. I know the coaches [are] happy. They say it every day. I know it's going to be a big year for me and I just can't wait."Wiggins did not miss any games last season and finished the year with 76 tackles and three interceptions in his 17 starts.

Russia-Controlled Crimea Declares Regional Emergency After Major Ukrainian Drone Strike
description: Crimea has declared a regional emergency following a significant Ukrainian drone attack, which officials claim is one of the largest assaults since the war began.
content: Russian-controlled Crimea has declared a regional emergency following what officials described as one of the largest Ukrainian drone attacks on the peninsula since the start of the war, triggering widespread disruption, infrastructure damage concerns and power outages.The announcement was made by pro-Moscow Crimean governor Sergey Aksyonov, who said emergency status had been imposed to improve coordination and response after sustained aerial assaults across the region.“A decision has been made… to sign decrees declaring a regional-level emergency situation in the Republic of Crimea and the city of Sevastopol,” Aksyonov wrote on Telegram.One of the largest drone assaults of the warThe declaration followed what appeared to be one of the most extensive Ukrainian drone attacks on Russian-controlled territory, including Crimea and multiple regions across Russia.According to Russia’s defence ministry, air defence systems intercepted 660 Ukrainian drones overnight across 12 regions, as well as over the Black Sea and Sea of Azov. Officials said the scale exceeded a previous record attack involving 556 drones in May.The ministry did not provide details on damage or identify specific targets.Strikes reported on naval and radar assetsUkraine’s Security Service claimed responsibility for strikes on Russian naval vessels and radar systems in the Kerch area of Crimea, a strategically important location linking the peninsula to mainland Russia.The agency said reconnaissance and mine-laying ships, including the Volga and Vyatka, as well as the ferry Petropavlovsk, were hit, causing fires. The claims could not be independently verified.Drone warfare intensifiesThe latest escalation reflects Ukraine’s increasing reliance on long-range drone operations targeting military, energy and logistics infrastructure deep inside Russian-controlled territory.Analysts say the campaign has placed growing pressure on Russian supply chains and military operations while disrupting fuel and infrastructure networks.Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said he had ordered a “40-day influence operation,” describing expanded long-range strikes aimed at increasing pressure on Moscow as earlier peace efforts stalled.He also said he had secured additional military assistance commitments during the recent G7 summit, including support from US President Donald Trump, which he said would strengthen Ukraine’s battlefield capabilities.

title: 2026 North American Darts Championship live results, scores, schedule & bracket: Long kicks off afternoon with win over Hall
description: Major qualification spots are up for grabs today.
content:
2026 North American Darts Championship live results, scores, schedule & bracket: Long kicks off afternoon with win over Hall originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.Jim Long and Brayden Hall didn't play their A-game this afternoon, but Long will be pleased to get over the line, with a comfortable 6-1 win.The U.S. Darts Masters first round took place last night, but the attention this afternoon is all on the North American qualifiers, who will battle for the 2026 North American Darts Championship title.Matt Campbell, the 2025 North American Darts Championship title winner, isn't competing this year, so we will see a different player take home the title today.Jim Long was the title: Venezuela death toll doubles as interim president vows to save ‘as many people as possible’
description: Delcy Rodríguez says foreign rescue teams are arriving but people are angry at official response and limited resourcesSurvivors tell of ‘brutal and fast’ Venezuela quake as hunt for survivors goes onVenezuela’s interim president, Delcy Rodríguez, has vowed to fight to save “as many people as possible” as the official death toll from the country’s worst earthquake in more than a century almost doubled, but frustration was growing at the perceived sluggishness of the government’s response.Rodríguez’s brother, Jorge, who is the president of the national assembly, said on Friday that the official number of dead had risen to 920. Delcy Rodríguez had earlier said that almost 3,000 people were injured. Speaking during a tour of La Guaira, the most devastated region, she said foreign search and rescue groups were starting to arrive. Continue reading...

title: Report: US Soccer offers Mauricio Pochettino extension through 2030 World Cup
description: While widely expected to return to the top echelons of European club soccer, USMNT manager Maurico Pochettino reportedly has the option to stay with the Stars and Stripes.
content: Could Mauricio Pochettino stay on as manager of the U.S. national team past this summer's World Cup?The former Chelsea, PSG and Tottenham Hotspur boss is in his first job coaching a national team, and has been widely expected to return to the European club game after his contract expires at the end of the 2026 tournament.But a report in The Athletic indicates that before this tournament, Pochettino was offered an extension that would take him through the 2030 World Cup.However, the report says, the coach and his staff won't make any decision until after the 2026 tournament. That's in line with what Pochettino told reporters at a roundtable earlier this week, when he said he is "open" to staying with the U.S. but also not rushing to make a decision."Now we're focused on the World Cup," the Argentina native said. "Then, if we want to stay, we have months to talk, or days or weeks. Because it's four years until the next World Cup."After finishing first in Group D, the U.S. will face Bosnia and Herzegovina in the World Cup round of 32 on Wednesday, July 1 in the Bay Area.While the 2026 World Cup hosted on home soil always has loomed large in American soccer, there are significant milestones approaching in the next cycle, too. In addition to the Concacaf Gold Cup and the Concacaf Nations League, the U.S. also is likely to be an invited team to the 2028 Copa América, the South American continental championship, which may return to U.S. soil after being hosted successfully stateside in 2016 and 2024.That tournament reportedly is working to avoid a conflict with the Olympic games in Los Angeles, where senior women's teams and U-23 men's teams with three overage players compete for the soccer medals.Pochettino also reportedly spoke with AC Milan about its managerial opening this summer, though the Italian club hired former Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim.USA TODAY Sports has contacted U.S. Soccer for comment. This article originally appeared on USA TODAY: Report: US Soccer offers Mauricio Pochettino extension through 2030 World Cup

title: Texans OC Nick Caley believes C.J. Stroud is 'locked in' for a breakout 2026 season
description: Most people would say that the Houston Texans' offense struggled under new offensive coordinator Nick Caley amid a playoff run, but he's still a believer that the best is yet to come.
content: Most people would say that the Houston Texans' offense struggled under new offensive coordinator Nick Caley amid a playoff run.To a degree, they'd be right. Houston's elite defense could only do so much in the divisional round loss against the New England Patriots to keep pace with Drake Maye on the road. Meanwhile, Pro Bowl quarterback C.J. Stroud coughed up four interceptions, including a pick-six that separated the two sides in a 28-16 loss.But Caley believes there's still a new gear unlocked for Stroud as he enters Year 4 with the franchise. He believes that since the season came to a close, Stroud has made strides and is poised for an even better 2026 campaign. "There was a lot of progress that C.J. and the offense made last year," Caley told the Houston Chronicle's Jonathan M. Alexander. "We continued to get better from the start of the season to the end of the regular season and just continued to make progress from week to week. So we're going to continue to build on that. It's a new year. C.J. has done a great job out here. Looks good. Locked in."Even with a 12-win season and the No. 1 defense nearly intact, Stroud must play better for Houston to stand a chance. The good news? The offense should feel different this fall with the newest additions to the line, tight end room and running back corp. Tytus Howard was traded this offseason to Cleveland, while the Texans added proven veterans like Wyatt Teller and Braden Smith to strengthen the run blocking. Houston also upgraded its running game by adding Lions starter David Montgomery to pair with Woody Marks. And for good measure, Houston also upgraded the tight end with the draft selection of Michigan's Marlin Klein and signing of former Saints starter Foster Moreau. Last season, Houston's ineffectiveness on the ground severely limited its ability to be a more dynamic offense. It was a priority to fix this offseason for Caley."You always want balance, and each game is a little different," Caley said. "I think we found a way to even that out as the season progressed. So finding a way to do that. And balance doesn't come necessarily in terms of a 50-50 run-pass ratio, but it's also the usage of different players."Caley also said that fixing the blocking at tight end was a top move needed this offseason for the franchise to function. "You can deploy different types of blocking schemes with different surfaces that you're attacking," Caley said. "Tight ends are an extension of the offensive line. We can get sturdy, we can control the edges, that always is going to help."Houston returns to the practice fields for the start of training camp on July 21. This article originally appeared on Texans Wire: Texans OC Nick Caley believes C.J. Stroud is 'locked in' for a breakout 2026 season

title: Air India Could Restore Flight Schedules if Middle East Situation Remains Stable: CEO Wilson Tells Staff
description: Air India may restore some of its recently reduced flight schedules if the situation in the Middle East remains stable, according to CEO Campbell Wilson.
content: Air India could reverse some of the flight schedule reductions it implemented in recent months if stability in the Middle East continues, Chief Executive Officer Campbell Wilson said in an internal communication to employees, citing improving access to regional airspace and moderate fuel prices.Wilson said the easing of tensions had created a "more stable environment," allowing more airspace to reopen while significantly moderating fuel prices, offering relief to airlines that have faced operational disruptions from the conflict."Should this trend continue, we may be able to wind back some of the schedule reductions we'd taken in recent months," Wilson wrote in the note.The comments signal improving operating conditions for the Tata Group-owned airline, which, like several global carriers, has been affected by airspace restrictions over the Middle East that lengthened flight paths, increased fuel burn and forced network adjustments.While expressing optimism, Wilson cautioned that "there's no guarantee" the conflict would not re-escalate, suggesting the airline remains cautious in planning future capacity.Air India had trimmed parts of its schedule in recent months as geopolitical tensions and restricted airspace added to operational challenges. The reopening of more airspace could shorten flying times on some international routes, while softer fuel prices may help reduce operating costs.The update comes as Air India continues its broader turnaround programme, which has included fleet upgrades, network expansion and improvements in operational performance.In the same communication, Wilson said the airline had recorded its highest-ever on-time performance in June, with overall OTP reaching 86% and domestic OTP touching 90%.

title: World Cup 2026 knockout fixtures, results and group tables
description: Which teams will reach the knockout stages of the 2026 World Cup and who is heading home early?
content: The 2026 World Cup is hurtling towards the knockout stages after 48 nations were split into 12 groups for the first time in the tournament’s long history. Co-hosts Mexico, USA and Canada are the top seeds in Groups A, B and D respectively, while Scotland are in Group C with Brazil, Morocco and Haiti, and England are all the way down in Group L with Croatia, Ghana and Panama. The top two sides in each group will qualify for the World Cup’s first ever round of 32, as will the eighth best third-place teams. Just three points could be enough for some teams to reach the knockout stages. There will be 104 matches, up by 40 since the Qatar World Cup in 2022, while Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo likely to play on this stage for the last time in their glittering careers. Here is how the knockout stages are shaping up: The World Cup began in Mexico City’s Azteca Stadium, the site of Diego Maradona’s most famous and infamous goals against England at the 1986 World Cup.It was also the venue for two classic World Cup finals: Brazil’s win over Italy in 1970 which included Carlos Alberto’s iconic team goal to cap a 4-1 win; and Argentina’s 3-2 win over West Germany in 1986, where Jorge Burruchaga grabbed an 84th-minute winner. Mexico and Canada will host 13 games in each, and the United States will host 78.From the quarter-finals onwards, the US will host all of the remaining matches, with the final in New Jersey’s MetLife Stadium.Who will win the World Cup?Football’s biggest question is back – and the debate is already heating up. England’s new golden generation, Argentina’s defending champions, France’s relentless depth and Spain’s evolving young side all have strong claims to glory at the World Cup.Now it’s your turn: who do you think will lift the trophy?

title: Peggy Gou taps the “uplifting energy of summer” for infectious single ‘Wo,man’ featuring Ayra Starr
description:
"I hope this record brings fun summer memories to all who love it”
The post Peggy Gou taps the “uplifting energy of summer” for infectious single ‘Wo,man’ featuring Ayra Starr appeared first on NME.
content:
Peggy Gou has teamed up with Ayra Starr on her new summer-ready single ‘Wo,man’ – check it out below.
The South Korean-born, London-based DJ, producer and artist released the track today (June 26) via XL Recordings, marking her latest release since her 2024 debut album ‘I Hear You’.
A typically euphoric summer dancefloor anthem from Gou, ‘Wo,man’ pairs Gou’s restlessly energetic production with a vocal from Nigerian afrobeats artist Starr that includes the earwormy chorus hook of “Adigidang dang dang di dang”.
Check out the video for ‘Wo,man’, directed by Onda, here:

Speaking about the single, Gou said: “When I was working on ‘Wo,man’, I knew I wanted a voice that could match the song’s uplifting energy for summer. The moment I shared it with Ayra, she got it instantly. Bringing our two worlds together felt completely natural, and she brought the perfect balance of sexiness and swag into the record. I hope this record brings fun summer memories to all who love it.”
Starr added: “I love Peggy – she’s such a cool artist. It was so much fun to make this song with her. It felt like such a summer vibe – I hope everyone enjoys it as much as I enjoyed making it!”
The collaboration follows a previous creative link-up between the pair, after Gou remixed Starr’s single ‘Where Do We Go’ earlier this year.

  










View this post on Instagram

























To mark the release of ‘Wo,man’, Gou is also opening a pop-up boutique in London, dubbed ‘The Gou,tique’, today for one day and night only. It is located at Dream Bags Jaguar Shoes on Kingsland Road in east London from 4pm to 9pm, with free entry on a first-come, first-served basis.
Gou will gift 200 mystery items from her personal collection, alongside 100 items from archival Peggy Gou merchandise lines, while DJs from her Gudu Records roster will soundtrack the event.
Gou is set for a busy summer of live appearances, including a headline show at London’s Old Royal Naval College in Greenwich on August 2.
Earlier this year, Gou also remixed Madonna’s ‘I Feel So Free’, the first preview of Madonna’s upcoming album ‘Confessions II’. She added a ‘90s dance-flavoured touch to the track, built around clattering drums and squelchy synths.
Starr, meanwhile, will be playing at Jorja Smith and Tems’ date of All Points East 2026, alongside the likes of Nia Archives, Elmiene and Kwn.
The post Peggy Gou taps the “uplifting energy of summer” for infectious single ‘Wo,man’ featuring Ayra Starr appeared first on NME.

title: സർവം എ.ഐയിൽ പങ്കാളിത്തത്തിന് കേന്ദ്രസർക്കാർ; രണ്ടുശതമാനംവരെ ഓഹരി സ്വന്തമാക്കിയേക്കും
Elliotte Friedman calls out Oilers owner for ‘parading players’ after Mike Babcock hiring
description: NHL insider Elliotte Friedman believes the Edmonton Oilers should stop relying on players to defend Mike Babcock’s hiring. Speaking on the latest 32 Thoughts podcast, Friedman said the organization’s ownership should publicly explain the decision. His comments followed Babcock’s introductory…
content: NHL insider Elliotte Friedman believes the Edmonton Oilers should stop relying on players to defend Mike Babcock’s hiring.Speaking on the latest 32 Thoughts podcast, Friedman said the organization’s ownership should publicly explain the decision. His comments followed Babcock’s introductory press conference, which Friedman described as more confrontational than expected.MORE: NHL world reacts to Edmonton Oilers hiring coach Mike BabcockFriedman acknowledged he has long viewed Babcock differently because of personal interactions with the veteran coach. However, he admitted the introductory media session raised concerns.“That press conference this week made me very nervous for them,” Friedman said. “I did not expect him to grovel. I don’t think he needs to grovel, but I wasn’t expecting that. That had a much harder tone than I expected.”He noted that Connor McDavid, Leon Draisaitl, and Zach Hyman have already defended the hire publicly. Friedman believes the focus should now shift away from players.“The one thing I agree with Marty Walsh on is – players don’t hire the coach,” Friedman said. “Now, in this case, they played a big role, but you know what? They’re parading the players out there to talk about this. I’d like to hear from the owner. Because he drove this bus.”Oilers’ ownership should share responsibilityEdmonton Oilers forward Leon Draisaitl (29) and forward Connor McDavid (97) talk. Mandatory Credit: Jamie Sabau-Imagn ImagesFriedman’s comments point toward Oilers owner Daryl Katz, who reportedly played a direct role in approving Babcock’s hiring. Katz met with Babcock and the team’s leadership group before the appointment became official.McDavid has repeatedly defended the decision. “We brought Babs in to be hard on me. And Leon. The top guys — that’s who we want to point the finger at,” the captain told Sportsnet. He also said Edmonton was “looking for the last 1 per cent” after consecutive Stanley Cup Final losses and a disappointing first-round exit in 2026.Friedman’s argument extends beyond public relations. Ownership made the final decision after the organization completed its review of Babcock’s past conduct and received clearance from the league. Having the owner explain why the franchise believes Babcock deserves another opportunity would reinforce that the decision belongs to management, not the players.Friedman believes a lot of reputations are on the lineEdmonton is making a calculated gamble. The Oilers believe Babcock’s demanding structure can tighten defensive play and improve accountability throughout the lineup. That approach could help maximize the championship window around McDavid and Draisaitl, but scrutiny will remain high until results arrive.“It was just really interesting to me about hearing, like an hour after Babcock was done in that kind of tone, Gary Bettman says, “We have certain expectations of the quorum and how this will work.” There’s a lot of reputations on the line here of some people who I think very highly of,” Friedman said. “I was a little concerned after that press conference.”MORE: Elliotte Friedman says 3 Oilers players ‘grilled’ coach Mike BabcockFor now, the discussion surrounding Babcock extends beyond systems and tactics. It also centers on who should answer for one of the NHL’s most closely watched coaching hires.

title: Lille agree personal terms with NEC’s Başar Önal
description: According to a report from Fabrice Hawkins, Lille have agreed personal terms with Başar Önal (21). A winger by trade, the Dutch-born Turkish youth international plays his club football with Dutch si...
content: Lille agree personal terms with NEC’s Başar ÖnalAccording to a report from Fabrice Hawkins, Lille have agreed personal terms with Başar Önal (21). A winger by trade, the Dutch-born Turkish youth international plays his club football with Dutch side NEC Nijmegen. Önal had a breakthrough season last year, making 34 appearances across all competitions and scoring nine and assisting nine. This included playing a significant part in NEC’s run to the KNVB Cup final, which they would ultimately lose 5-1 to AZ Alkmaar. The wings were a problem area for Lille last season during their poor run of form at the start of the new year, with the club’s midseason attacking recruits Gaëtan Perrin and Noah Edjouma yet to make a splash. Lille could also need to strengthen the attack with Matias Fernandez-Pardo heavily linked with a big-money move this summer. NEC are reportedly holding out for around €7m for Önal, with negotiations ongoing between them and Les Dogues. GFFN | Nick Hartland

title: JSSC JTMACCE Result 2026 Out: झारखंड माध्यमिक शिक्षक भर्ती परीक्षा का रिजल्ट जारी, ऐसे करें PDF डाउनलोड
description: Jharkhand Teacher Result : झारखंड कर्मचारी चयन आयोग (JSSC) ने JTMACCE 2026 परीक्षा का रिजल्ट जारी कर दिया है। उम्मीदवार आधिकारिक वेबसाइट से पीडीएफ डाउनलोड कर अपना रोल नंबर चेक कर सकते हैं।
content:
JSSC Result PDF : झारखंड में शिक्षक भर्ती का इंतजार कर रहे उम्मीदवारों के लिए बड़ी खबर है। झारखंड कर्मचारी चयन आयोग (JSSC) ने झारखंड प्रशिक्षित माध्यमिक आचार्य संयुक्त प्रतियोगी परीक्षा (JTMACCE) 2026 का परिणाम घोषित कर दिया है।
परीक्षा में शामिल हुए उम्मीदवार अब आयोग की आधिकारिक वेबसाइट jssc.jharkhand.gov.in पर जाकर अपना रिजल्ट देख सकते हैं। आयोग ने चयनित अभ्यर्थियों की सूची जारी कर दी है, जिससे उम्मीदवार आसानी से यह पता लगा सकते हैं कि उनका चयन हुआ है या नहीं। लंबे समय से परिणाम का इंतजार कर रहे अभ्यर्थियों के लिए यह महत्वपूर्ण अपडेट है।
झारखंड माध्यमिक शिक्षक भर्ती परीक्षा का रिजल्ट जारी
आयोग ने परिणाम पीडीएफ फॉर्मेट में जारी किया है। उम्मीदवारों को वेबसाइट से रिजल्ट पीडीएफ डाउनलोड करनी होगी और उसमें दिए गए रोल नंबर की सूची में अपना अनुक्रमांक खोजकर परिणाम देखना होगा। यदि आपका रोल नंबर सूची में मौजूद है, तो इसका मतलब है कि आप परीक्षा में सफल हुए हैं।
भर्ती प्रक्रिया के अगले चरण, दस्तावेज सत्यापन और अन्य जरूरी सूचनाएं भी आयोग की आधिकारिक वेबसाइट jssc.jharkhand.gov.in पर जारी की जाएंगी। इसलिए उम्मीदवारों को सलाह दी जाती है कि वे समय-समय पर वेबसाइट पर नजर बनाए रखें।
ये खबर भी पढ़ें : Indian Navy SSC Officer Recruitment: भारतीय नौसेना में 275 SSC अधिकारी पदों पर भर्ती, 27 जुलाई तक करें आवेदन
उम्मीदवार आधिकारिक वेबसाइट पर रिजल्ट चेक करें
रिजल्ट डाउनलोड करने के लिए सबसे पहले JSSC की आधिकारिक वेबसाइट पर जाएं। इसके बाद होमपेज पर मौजूद &#8220;What&#8217;s New&#8221; सेक्शन में जाएं और &#8220;Result of JTMACCE-2025&#8221; लिंक पर क्लिक करें। इसके बाद रिजल्ट की पीडीएफ आपकी स्क्रीन पर खुल जाएगी।
अब Ctrl + F की मदद से अपना रोल नंबर सर्च करें। भविष्य की भर्ती प्रक्रिया के लिए रिजल्ट की पीडीएफ डाउनलोड करके उसका प्रिंटआउट भी सुरक्षित रखें। यदि किसी उम्मीदवार को परिणाम देखने में परेशानी हो रही है, तो वह आयोग की वेबसाइट पर उपलब्ध नोटिस और निर्देशों की भी जांच कर सकता है।

title: Congress: ଅଜୟ କୁମାର ଲଲ୍ଲୁଙ୍କ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଲାଲଜୀ ଦେଶାଇଙ୍କୁ ଦାୟିତ୍ବ
description:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ବର: ସାଙ୍ଗଠନିକ ଭିତ୍ତିକୁ ଅଧିକ ସୁଦୃଢ଼ କରିବା ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟରେ ଅଖିଳ ଭାରତୀୟ କଂଗ୍ରେସ କମିଟି (ଏଆଇସିସି) ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଗୁଜରାଟର ବରିଷ୍ଠ କଂଗ୍ରେସ ନେତା ଲାଲଜୀ ଦେଶାଇଙ୍କୁ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ନୂଆ ଏଆଇସିସି ପ୍ରଭାରୀ ଭାବେ ନିଯୁକ୍ତ କରିଛି। ସେ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନର ପ୍ରଭାରୀ ଅଜୟ କୁମାର ଲଲ୍ଲୁଙ୍କ ସ୍ଥାନ ନେବେ। ଏହି ନିଯୁକ୍ତି ତୁରନ୍ତ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାରୀ ହେବ ବୋଲି ଏଆଇସିସି ସାଧାରଣ ସମ୍ପାଦକ (ସଂଗଠନ) କେ.ସି. ଭେନୁଗୋପାଳ ଜାରି କରିଥିବା ବିଜ୍ଞପ୍ତିରେ କୁହାଯାଇଛି।
ସୂଚନାଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ଲାଲଜୀ ଦେଶାଇ କଂଗ୍ରେସର ଜଣେ ଦକ୍ଷ ସାଙ୍ଗଠନିକ ନେତା ଭାବେ ପରିଚିତ। ସେ ୨୦୧୮ ମସିହାରୁ ଅଖିଳ ଭାରତୀୟ କଂଗ୍ରେସ ସେବାଦଳର ମୁଖ୍ୟ ସଂଗଠକ ଭାବେ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରୁଛନ୍ତି। ଦଳର ସାଙ୍ଗଠନିକ ବିସ୍ତାର, କର୍ମୀ ପ୍ରଶିକ୍ଷଣ, ସଦସ୍ୟତା ଅଭିଯାନ ଏବଂ ନିର୍ବାଚନୀ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତିରେ ତାଙ୍କର ଦୀର୍ଘ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା ରହିଛି। ସେ କଂଗ୍ରେସ ୱାର୍କିଂ କମିଟିର ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଆମନ୍ତ୍ରିତ ସଦସ୍ୟ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅଟନ୍ତି। 
Dharmendra Pradhan; ଜନ୍ମଦିନରେ ଧର୍ମେନ୍ଦ୍ର ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କୁ କଂଗ୍ରେସର କଟାକ୍ଷ
ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ, ଉତ୍ତର ପ୍ରଦେଶ କଂଗ୍ରେସର ପୂର୍ବତନ ସଭାପତି ଅଜୟ କୁମାର ଲଲ୍ଲୁ ୨୦୨୪ ଲୋକସଭା ଓ ବିଧାନସଭା ନିର୍ବାଚନ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ସମୟରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶାର ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ସମ୍ଭାଳିଥିଲେ। ତାଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାଳରେ ରାଜ୍ୟ କଂଗ୍ରେସର ସାଙ୍ଗଠନିକ ପୁନର୍ଗଠନ ଉପରେ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱ ଦିଆଯାଇଥିଲା। ଜିଲ୍ଲା କଂଗ୍ରେସ ସଭାପତିଙ୍କ ନିଯୁକ୍ତି ସହ 'ସଙ୍ଗଠନ ସୃଜନ ଅଭିଯାନ' ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ବୁଥ୍ ସ୍ତରରେ ଦଳକୁ ସୁଦୃଢ଼ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ନିଆଯାଇଥିଲା । ଏଆଇସିସି ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଜାରି ବିଜ୍ଞପ୍ତିରେ ଲଲ୍ଲୁଙ୍କ ଅବଦାନକୁ ପ୍ରଶଂସା କରାଯାଇଛି।
୨୦୨୯ ସାଧାରଣ ନିର୍ବାଚନକୁ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିରେ ରଖି ଓଡ଼ିଶାରେ ଦଳୀୟ ସଂଗଠନକୁ ମଜଭୁତ କରିବା, ବୁଥ୍ ସ୍ତରରେ କର୍ମୀଙ୍କୁ ସକ୍ରିୟ କରିବା ଏବଂ ରାଜ୍ୟ ନେତୃତ୍ୱ ସହ ସମନ୍ୱୟ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିବା ଲାଲଜୀ ଦେଶାଇଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଆହ୍ୱାନ ହେବ।

title: Russia-annexed Crimea declares ‘emergency’ amid Ukraine strikes

title: വിഎസ്എസ്‍സിയിലും എൽപിഎസ്‍സിയിലും പുതിയ സ്ഥിരം മേധാവിമാ‌ർ, ഐഎസ്ആർഒയിൽ തലമുറ മാറ്റത്തിന്റെ രണ്ടാം ഘട്ടം
description: ഇന്ത്യൻ ബഹിരാകാശ ഏജൻസിയുടെ തിരുവനന്തപുരത്തെ സുപ്രധാന കേന്ദ്രങ്ങളിൽ ഇടവേളയ്ക്ക് ശേഷം സ്ഥിരം ഡയറക്ട‌ർമാരെ നിയമിച്ചു. ഐഎസ്ആർഒ മാതൃകേന്ദ്രമായ വിക്രം സാരാഭായ് സ്പേസ് സെന്ററിൽ ഡോ. യു.പി.രാജീവാണ് പുതിയ മേധാവി.
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: ഐഎസ്ആ‌ർഒ കേന്ദ്രങ്ങളിലെ നേതൃമാറ്റം തുടരുന്നു. ഇന്ത്യൻ ബഹിരാകാശ ഏജൻസിയുടെ തിരുവനന്തപുരത്തെ സുപ്രധാന കേന്ദ്രങ്ങളിൽ ഇടവേളയ്ക്ക് ശേഷം സ്ഥിരം ഡയറക്ട‌ർമാരെ നിയമിച്ചു. ​ഐഎസ്ആർഒ മാതൃകേന്ദ്രമായ വിക്രം സാരാഭായ് സ്പേസ് സെന്ററിൽ ഡോ. യു.പി.രാജീവാണ് പുതിയ മേധാവി. വലിയമല ലിക്വിഡ് പ്രൊപ്പൽഷൻ സിസ്റ്റം സെന്ററിൽ എൻ.ജയനാണ് ഡയറക്ടർ സ്ഥാനം.</p><p>മുൻ​ഗാമികൾ വിരമിച്ച ഒഴിവിൽ കഴിഞ്ഞ ഒരു മാസം ഇവർ താത്കാലിക ചുമതല വഹിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. ജൂൺ 25ന് നിയമനം സ്ഥിരപ്പെടുത്തിക്കൊണ്ട് ഉത്തരവിറങ്ങി. വിക്രം സാരാഭായ് സ്പേസ് സെന്റർ മുൻ മേധാവി എ. രാജരാജൻ മേയ് അവസാനമാണ് വിരമിച്ചത്. എൽപിഎസ്‍സിയിൽ ഡയറക്ടറായിരുന്ന എം. മോഹൻ വിരമിച്ചത് ഏപ്രിൽ അവസാനവും.</p><p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം ഐഎസ്ആ‌‌‌ർഒ ഇനേർഷ്യൽ സിസ്റ്റംസ് യൂണിറ്റിലും മഹേന്ദ്ര​ഗിരി ഐഎസ്ആർഒ പ്രൊപ്പൽഷൻ കോംപ്ലക്സിലും കൂടി തലവന്മാ‌ർ മാറും. ഐഐഎസ്‍യു മേധാവി എൽ. സൗമ്യനാരായണൻ ജൂൺ മുപ്പതിന് വിരമിക്കുന്ന ഒഴിവിൽ നിലവിലെ അസോസിയേറ്റ് ഡയറക്ട‌ർ ജോജി ജെ. ചാമൻ മേധാവിയാകും. ഐപിആർസിയിൽ ജെ.അസി‌ർ പാക്കിരാജ് ജൂൺ മുപ്പതിന് വിരമിക്കുമ്പോൾ നാരായണൻ അപ്പു പുതിയ മേധാവിയായി ചുമതലയേൽക്കും.&nbsp;</p><p>നിർമ്മാണം പുരോഗമിക്കുന്ന ഇന്റഗ്രേറ്റഡ് ക്രയോജനിക് എഞ്ചിൻ ടെസ്റ്റ് ഫെസിലിറ്റിയുടെ പ്രൊജക്ട് ഡയറക്ടറാണ് നാരായണൻ അപ്പു. മറിച്ചൊരു ഉത്തരവ് വരും വരെ ഈ ചുമതലയിലും അദ്ദേഹം തുടരും. ഉപഗ്രഹ വികസന കേന്ദ്രമായ ബെംഗളൂരു യു.ആർ.റാവു സാറ്റലൈറ്റ് സെന്‍ററിലും അടുത്ത മാസം അവസാനം നേതൃമാറ്റം ഉണ്ടാകുമെന്നാണ് വിവരം. നിലവിലെ മേധാവി എം.ശങ്കരൻ ജൂലൈ അവസാനം വിരമിക്കും.</p><p><strong>വിഎസ്എസ്‍സിയിൽ ഡോ. യു.പി. രാജീവ്</strong></p><p>വി.എസ്.എസ്.സി.യിലെ അസോസിയേറ്റ് ഡയറക്ടർ (R&amp;D) ആയി സേവനമനുഷ്ഠിക്കുമ്പോഴാണ് സുപ്രധാന കേന്ദ്രത്തിന്റെ തലപ്പത്തേക്ക് ഡോ.യു.പി.രാജീവിന് നിയമനം ലഭിക്കുന്നത്. ​റോക്കറ്റ് കൺട്രോൾ ആൻഡ് ഗൈഡൻസ് (Rocket Control &amp; Guidance) വിഭാഗത്തിൽ ദീർഘകാലത്തെ പ്രവർത്തന പരിചയമുള്ള ഡോ. രാജീവ്, ഐ.എസ്.ആർ.ഒ.യുടെ ചരിത്രപ്രധാനമായ വിക്ഷേപണ വാഹനങ്ങളുടെ (Launch Vehicles) മിഷൻ ഡിസൈനിലും സിമുലേഷനുകൾക്കും (Mission Simulation) നേതൃത്വം നൽകിയ വ്യക്തിയാണ്.</p><p>​തിരുവനന്തപുരം ഗവൺമെന്റ് എഞ്ചിനീയറിംഗ് കോളേജിൽ (CET) നിന്ന് 'അപ്ലൈഡ് ഇലക്ട്രോണിക്സ് ആൻഡ് ഇൻസ്ട്രുമെന്റേഷൻ' ബിരുദവും എൻഐടി (NIT) കോഴിക്കോടിൽ നിന്ന് ഇൻസ്‌ട്രുമെന്റേഷൻ ആൻഡ് കണ്ട്രോൾ സിസ്റ്റത്തിൽ ബിരുദാനന്തര ബിരുദവും നേടിയ ശേഷമാണ് യു.പി.രാജീവ് ഐ.എസ്.ആർ.ഒ.യിൽ ഔദ്യോഗിക ജീവിതം ആരംഭിക്കുന്നത്. തുടർന്ന് IISC ബംഗളുരുവിൽ നിന്ന് പിഎച്ച്‍ഡി പൂർത്തിയാക്കി. കൊല്ലം പത്തനാപുരം സ്വദേശിയായ ഡോ. രാജീവ്, ഉണ്ണികൃഷ്ണൻ നായരുടെയും പത്മാക്ഷിയമ്മയുടെയും മകനാണ്. വി.എസ്.എസ്.സി.യിലെ മുതിർന്ന ശാസ്ത്രജ്ഞയായ ഡോ.ആശ പി.നായർ ആണ് ഭാര്യ. പാർവതി നായർ മകളാണ്.</p><p><strong>എൽപിഎസ്‍സിയിൽ എൻ.ജയൻ</strong></p><p>എൽപിഎസ്‍സി അസോസിയേറ്റ് ഡയറക്ടർ, ക്രയോ സ്റ്റേജ് പ്രൊജക്റ്റ്‌ ഡയറക്ടർ, വിഎസ്എസ്‍സി യിൽ നെക്സ്റ്റ് ജനറേഷൻ ലോഞ്ച് വെഹിക്കിൾ (NGLV) പ്രൊജക്റ്റ്‌ ഡയറക്ടർ എന്നീ ചുമതലകൾ വഹിച്ച ശേഷമാണ് എൽപിഎസ്‍സി തലപ്പത്തേക്കുള്ള എൻ.ജയൻ്റെ കടന്നുവരവ്. ക്രയോജനിക് എൻജിൻ തദ്ദേശിയമായ വികസിപ്പിക്കുന്നതിൽ ‍സുപ്രധാന പങ്ക് വഹിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. എൽവിഎം 3 (ജിഎസ്എൽവി മാർക്ക് 3) റോക്കറ്റിൽ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്ന CE 20 ക്രയോജനിക് എഞ്ചിൻ വികസിപ്പിച്ച സംഘത്തിന്റെ മേധാവിയായിരുന്നു.</p><p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം ഗവൺമെന്റ് എഞ്ചിനീയറിംഗ് കോളേജിൽ (CET) നിന്ന് മെക്കാനിക്കൽ എഞ്ചിനിയറിങ്ങിൽ ബിരുദവും ബാംഗ്ലൂർ ഇന്ത്യൻ ഇൻസ്റ്റിറ്റ്യൂട്ട് ഓഫ് സയൻസിൽ നിന്ന് എറോസ്പേസ് എഞ്ചിനീറിങ്ങിൽ ME ബിരുദവും ഒന്നാം റാങ്കോടെ നേടി. Astronautical society of India സ്പേസ് ഗോൾഡ് മെഡൽ, 3 ISRO ടീം അവാർഡ് എന്നിവ നേടിയിട്ടുണ്ട്. ബഹിരാകാശ ഗവേഷണ രംഗത്തെ മികച്ച സംഭാവനകൾ കണക്കിലെടുത്തു രാജ്യം ശാസ്ത്ര രംഗത്ത് നൽകുന്ന പരമോന്നത ബഹുമതിയായ രാഷ്ട്രീയ വിഗ്യാൻ പുരസ്‌കാരം 2025 രാഷ്ട്രപതിയിൽ നിന്ന് ഏറ്റു വാങ്ങി. തിരുവനന്തപുരം മണ്ണാമൂല സ്വദേശി ആണ്. ഭാര്യ ശോഭ ജയൻ I and B മന്ത്രാലയത്തിൽ സീനിയർ അക്കൗണ്ട്സ് ഓഫീസറാണ്. മക്കൾ ശ്വേത, സിദ്ധാർഥ്.</p><p></p><p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Trump Claims Iran Violated Ceasefire With Hormuz Drone Attack
description: US President Donald Trump said Iran firing at cargo ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz violated their ceasefire agreement. In a social media post Friday, Trump said “at least four” one-way attack drones targeted ships in the waterway. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Air India Posts Record On-Time Performance in June, CEO Wilson Credits Operational Improvements
description: Air India CEO Campbell Wilson announced significant improvements for the airline in June, achieving an overall on-time performance (OTP) of 86% and a domestic OTP of 90%.
content: In a message to employees on Friday, Air India CEO Campbell Wilson said that June marked a milestone for the Tata Group-owned airline, with overall on-time performance (OTP) reaching 86 per cent and domestic OTP touching a record 90 per cent. He said the improvement reflected stronger aircraft reliability, better operational systems and tighter execution, although he acknowledged that a temporarily reduced flight schedule and favourable weather had also contributed.Campbell Wilson said customer response to the airline's first retrofitted Boeing 787 Dreamliners had exceeded expectations. Net Promoter Score (NPS), a key measure of customer loyalty, improved by more than 70 points on the upgraded aircraft from (-31) on non-retrofitted aircraft to (+43). Passenger ratings for cabin comfort, inflight entertainment and meals also climbed from around 2.7 to 4.1 on a five-point scale.Marking an upward tick in airline's performance, CEO Wilson wrote, "First, the early customer response to our newly-retrofitted B787 fleet has been extremely heartening. Customer NPS on the two retrofitted aircraft back in operation has improved by more than 70 NPS points versus the non-retrofitted ones, rising from -31 to +43! CSAT scores for specific attributes like cabin comfort & ambience, IFE and meals have also risen markedly, from around 2.7 (out of 5) to 4.1. This is great validation that our new physical product is rising to match the quality of our people and service. With another B788 en route to California to commence retrofit as I write, and around 8 more new or retrofitted wide-bodies entering service this year (including a new B789 arriving in India this weekend), we can look forward to continued upgradation and positive feedback.""In addition to all-time-high NPS, June has also seen very strong improvement in on-time performance, with overall OTP at 86 per cent and domestic OTP at a remarkable 90 percent, both of which are the highest on record! While this is helped a little by our temporarily reduced schedule (and benign weather), it also rests on ongoing improvements in aircraft health, systems, focus and procedures. Put simply, our operation is becoming more resilient, and our customers are feeling the benefit," the CEO said.The airline has faced operational headwinds in recent months, including airspace disruptions linked to geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, prompting temporary schedule reductions on parts of its network.
