title: 6 दिन से बिजली गुल: खंडवा में गुस्साई महिलाओं ने MPB दफ्तर का किया घेराव, कर्मचारियों ने बंद किया गेट
description: Electricity Crisis Khandwa: खंडवा में बिजली संकट पर भारी बवाल, 6 दिन से अंधेरे में डूबे राजेंद्र नगर और महादेवी नगर की महिलाओं ने कहारवाड़ी पावर हाउस घेरा, निकाले मीटर के कट-आउट।
content:
Protest at MPB Office Khandwa: मध्य प्रदेश के खंडवा जिले में हाल ही में आई तेज आंधी-तूफान के बाद बिजली व्यवस्था अब तक पूरी तरह पटरी पर नहीं लौट सकी है। न्यू राजेंद्र नगर और महादेवी नगर क्षेत्र में पिछले छह दिनों से बिजली आपूर्ति ठप होने से लोगों का गुस्सा फूट पड़ा।
शुक्रवार को बड़ी संख्या में महिलाएं कहारवाड़ी स्थित विद्युत विभाग के पावर हाउस पहुंचीं और अधिकारियों के खिलाफ जमकर नारेबाजी करते हुए प्रदर्शन किया। प्रदर्शनकारियों ने जल्द बिजली बहाल करने की मांग की।
छह दिन से अंधेरे में रहने को मजबूर लोग
स्थानीय लोगों का कहना है कि तेज आंधी और तूफान के कारण कई बिजली लाइनें और पेड़ क्षतिग्रस्त हो गए थे। इसके बाद विद्युत विभाग ने शहर के अधिकांश हिस्सों में बिजली आपूर्ति बहाल कर दी, लेकिन न्यू राजेंद्र नगर और महादेवी नगर में छह दिन बीतने के बाद भी बिजली नहीं पहुंच सकी। लगातार बिजली गुल रहने से लोगों को अंधेरे में रातें बितानी पड़ रही हैं, वहीं पानी की आपूर्ति भी गंभीर रूप से प्रभावित हो रही है।
पावर हाउस पहुंचकर महिलाओं ने किया जोरदार प्रदर्शन
बिजली संकट से परेशान महिलाएं बड़ी संख्या में कहारवाड़ी स्थित विद्युत विभाग के पावर हाउस पहुंचीं। प्रदर्शन की सूचना मिलते ही विभाग के अधिकारी मौके से चले गए, जबकि कर्मचारियों ने कार्यालय का गेट बंद कर खुद को अंदर कर लिया। इससे नाराज महिलाओं ने गेट के बाहर जमकर नारेबाजी की और विरोध प्रदर्शन किया। इस दौरान कुछ महिलाओं ने बिजली मीटर बोर्ड पर लगे कट-आउट भी निकाल दिए, जिससे मौके पर कुछ देर के लिए तनाव का माहौल बन गया।
स्थायी समाधान की मांग, विभाग से जल्द कार्रवाई की उम्मीद
खंडवा जिले के महादेवी नगर निवासी आरती पटेल ने बताया कि शहर के अन्य इलाकों में बिजली जल्दी बहाल हो गई, लेकिन उनके क्षेत्र में छह दिन बाद भी सप्लाई शुरू नहीं हुई। उन्होंने कहा कि अंधेरे के कारण जंगली जानवरों का खतरा बना रहता है और पानी की समस्या से लोगों का दैनिक जीवन प्रभावित हो रहा है।
यह भी पढ़ें: दमोह में मोहर्रम के शहर गश्त के दौरान टला बड़ा हादसा; आग से खेल रहे युवक का मुंह जला- देखें VIDEO
कई बार शिकायत करने के बावजूद समाधान नहीं मिला। क्षेत्रवासियों ने विद्युत विभाग से तत्काल बिजली आपूर्ति बहाल करने के साथ-साथ भविष्य में ऐसी स्थिति से बचने के लिए स्थायी समाधान और मजबूत विद्युत व्यवस्था सुनिश्चित करने की मांग की है।

title: 'ഇനിയൊരു വന്ദനയെ നാടിന് നഷ്ടപ്പെടരുത്'; ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാന്‌ പിന്തുണയുമായി ഡോ. വന്ദന ദാസിന്റെ പിതാവ്, തൂഫാൻ വാറിയർ ബാഡ്‌ജ്‌ അണിയിച്ച്‌ മന്ത്രി
description: ലഹരിക്ക് അടിമയായ പ്രതി കൊലപ്പെടുത്തിയ ഡോ. വന്ദന ദാസിന്റെ പിതാവ് കെ. ജി. മോഹൻദാസ് ലഹരി വിരുദ്ധ പോരാട്ടത്തിൽ പങ്കാളിയായി. അന്താരാഷ്ട്ര ലഹരി വിരുദ്ധ ദിനത്തിൽ രമേശ് ചെന്നിത്തല അദ്ദേഹത്തിന് തൂഫാൻ വാറിയർ ബാഡ്‌ജ്‌ നൽകി ആദരിച്ചു.
content: <p>ഹരിപ്പാട്: ലഹരിക്ക് അടിമയായ പ്രതി ക്രൂരമായി കൊലചെയ്ത ഡോ. വന്ദന ദാസിന്റെ ഓർമ്മകൾ ഇനി നാടിൻ്റെ ലഹരി വിരുദ്ധ പോരാട്ടത്തിന് കരുത്താകും. അന്താരാഷ്ട്ര ലഹരി വിരുദ്ധ ദിനത്തിൽ വന്ദനയുടെ പിതാവ് കെ. ജി. മോഹൻദാസിനെ ആഭ്യന്തര മന്ത്രി രമേശ് ചെന്നിത്തല ഹരിപ്പാട് എം.എൽ.എ ഓഫീസിൽ വച്ച് തൂഫാൻ വാറിയർ ബാഡ്‌ജ്‌ ധരിപ്പിച്ചു. ലഹരി ഒരു വ്യക്തിയെ മാത്രമല്ല, കുടുംബങ്ങളെയും സമൂഹത്തെയും തകർക്കുന്ന മഹാവിപത്താണെന്ന് രമേശ് ചെന്നിത്തല പറഞ്ഞു. ഡോ. വന്ദന ദാസിന്റെ മരണം കേരളം മറക്കാൻ പാടില്ലാത്ത വേദനയാണ്. മറ്റൊരു വന്ദനയും ഈ നാടിന് നഷ്ടമാകരുത്. അതുകൊണ്ടാണ് ലഹരിക്കെതിരായ ഈ പോരാട്ടത്തിൽ ഓരോരുത്തരും പങ്കാളികളാകേണ്ടതെന്നും രമേശ് ചെന്നിത്തല പറഞ്ഞു.</p><p>മകളെ നഷ്ടപ്പെട്ട ഒരു പിതാവെന്ന നിലയിൽ, ലഹരി സൃഷ്ടിക്കുന്ന ദുരന്തം മറ്റൊരു കുടുംബത്തിനും ഉണ്ടാകരുതെന്നാണ് തന്റെ പ്രാർത്ഥനയെന്ന് മോഹൻദാസ് പറഞ്ഞു. ലഹരിക്കെതിരായ സംസ്ഥാന സർക്കാരിന്റെ പ്രവർത്തനങ്ങൾക്കും 'ഓപ്പറേഷൻ തൂഫാൻ: ദി നാർക്കോ ഹണ്ട്' ക്യാമ്പെയ്നിനും അദ്ദേഹം പൂർണ പിന്തുണ പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചു. യുവജനങ്ങളെ ലഹരിയുടെ പിടിയിൽ നിന്ന് രക്ഷിക്കാൻ സർക്കാർ നടത്തുന്ന എല്ലാ പ്രവർത്തനങ്ങൾക്കും സമൂഹം കൈകോർക്കണമെന്നും, തന്റെ പിന്തുണ തുടർന്നും ഉണ്ടാകുമെന്നും അറിയിച്ചു.</p><p>ലഹരിക്കെതിരായ പോരാട്ടം നിയമപാലകരുടെ മാത്രം ദൗത്യമല്ലെന്നും, ഓരോ കുടുംബത്തിന്റെയും സാമൂഹിക സംഘടനകളുടെയും വിദ്യാഭ്യാസ സ്ഥാപനങ്ങളുടെയും കൂട്ടായ പങ്കാളിത്തം അനിവാര്യമാണെന്നും മന്ത്രി രമേശ് ചെന്നിത്തല പറഞ്ഞു. ഡോ. വന്ദന ദാസിന്റെ കുടുംബത്തിന്റെ പിന്തുണ ഈ ജനകീയ മുന്നേറ്റത്തിന് വലിയ ആത്മവിശ്വാസവും പ്രചോദനവുമാണെന്നും അദ്ദേഹം കൂട്ടിച്ചേർത്തു. കൊട്ടാരക്കര താലൂക്കാശുപത്രിയിൽ ഹൗസ് സർജനായി സേവനം ചെയ്യുന്നതിനിടെയാണ്‌ 2023 മേയ്‌ 10ന്‌ ഡോ. വന്ദനയെ ആശുപത്രിയിൽ വൈദ്യപരിശോധനയ്‌ക്കായി പോലീസ്‌ കൊണ്ടുവന്ന പ്രതി സന്ദീപ്‌ കത്രിക കൊണ്ട്‌ ക്രൂരമായി കുത്തിക്കൊലപ്പെടുത്തിയത്‌.</p>

title: Picklebay Zonals - North: Arjun Singh Reigns Supreme to Win Pro Men's Singles Title
description: Arjun Singh did not drop a single game en route to the Pro Men's Singles title, strengthening his case for a spot in India's senior team for the Pickleball World Cup.
content: Arjun Singh reigned supreme in the Pro Men's Singles final at the Picklebay Zonals - North, an Indian Pickleball Association (IPA) sanctioned PWR 700 event, at Horizon x Courtplay in Gurgaon on June 26. He won the title without dropping a game.Arjun, who has already earned selection in India's U18 team and will also lead the side as captain, has now strengthened his chances of earning a place in the senior Indian team as he beat Anish Frolian R in straight games (11-7, 11-6) in the final to win the title.Arjun, the 15-year-old pickleball phenom from Mumbai, has been the dominant player in the category since the onset of the tournament. He started off with an 11-3 win over Aman Patel. In the Round of 16, he made quick work of Vishal Jadhav by registering a 15-2 win. In the quarterfinals, he continued to play in the same rhythm and defeated Yash Gaikwad 15-3.In the semifinal against Diwakar Agarwal, Arjun breezed past his opponent with an 11-5, 11-6 win before wrapping up his campaign in the category with another straight-game victory over Anish.This title, coming on the back of his consistent performances in 2026, will further increase his chances of making it to the Indian senior team for the Pickleball World Cup, to be held in Da Nang, Vietnam, from August 30 to September 6.About Indian Pickleball Association:The Indian Pickleball Association is the official governing body for pickleball in India and is dedicated to promoting, developing, and organising the sport across the country. The association continues to inspire players of all ages and skill levels to embrace the game through events like the IPA Nationals. IPA is affiliated with the Asian Pickleball Association (APA) and the Global Pickleball Federation (GPF).About Pickleball World Ranking:PWR is a national ranking system that spans all age groups, skill divisions, and formats -including singles, doubles, and mixed categories. It serves as the official National Sports Federation Ranking for India. With multiple sanctioned events taking place every week across the country, PWR defines the top Indian players at every level and forms the foundation for team selection at the school, district, state, and national stages.Stay connected with all the latest news on Pickleball, exclusive behind-the-scenes content, tips, and inspiration you won't find anywhere else. Your ultimate destination for all things pickleball - where the community comes together for news, views, and the sport that's sweeping the globe. Follow us at @pickleballnow.in on Instagram and be part of the community!

title: ପୋଡ଼ି ପାଉଁଶ ହେଲା ୩,୧୧୬ କିଲୋ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ, NDPS ଆକ୍ଟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ
description:
ମୋହନା, ୨୬।୬ (ମନ୍ମଥ ମିଶ୍ର): ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ରା. ଉଦୟଗିରି ଥାନା ପୋଲିସ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆଜି ମାଦକ ଦ୍ରବ୍ୟ କାରବାର ବିରୋଧରେ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଇଛି। ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସମୟରେ ଚଢ଼ାଉ କରାଯାଇ ଜବତ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରାୟ ୩,୧୧୬ କିଲୋଗ୍ରାମ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇକୁ NDPS ଆଇନର ସମସ୍ତ ନିୟମ ପାଳନ କରି ସଫଳତାର ସହ ପୋଡ଼ି ଧ୍ୱଂସ କରାଯାଇଛି। ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚୋରା ଚାଲାଣ ସମୟରେ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସ୍ଥାନରୁ ଜବତ କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଏହି ବିପୁଳ ପରିମାଣର […]
The post ପୋଡ଼ି ପାଉଁଶ ହେଲା ୩,୧୧୬ କିଲୋ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ, NDPS ଆକ୍ଟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ମୋହନା, ୨୬।୬ (ମନ୍ମଥ ମିଶ୍ର): ଗଜପତି ଜିଲା ରା. ଉଦୟଗିରି ଥାନା ପୋଲିସ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆଜି ମାଦକ ଦ୍ରବ୍ୟ କାରବାର ବିରୋଧରେ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଇଛି। ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସମୟରେ ଚଢ଼ାଉ କରାଯାଇ ଜବତ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରାୟ ୩,୧୧୬ କିଲୋଗ୍ରାମ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇକୁ NDPS ଆଇନର ସମସ୍ତ ନିୟମ ପାଳନ କରି ସଫଳତାର ସହ ପୋଡ଼ି ଧ୍ୱଂସ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚୋରା ଚାଲାଣ ସମୟରେ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସ୍ଥାନରୁ ଜବତ କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଏହି ବିପୁଳ ପରିମାଣର ଗଞ୍ଜେଇକୁ ପ୍ରଥମେ ରା. ଉଦୟଗିରିର ମାନ୍ୟବର ଜେଏମଏଫ୍‌ସିଙ୍କ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଉପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରାଯାଇ ଏକ ସଠିକ୍ ତାଲିକା ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏହାପରେ ଏହି ନିଷିଦ୍ଧ ସାମଗ୍ରୀର ଧ୍ୱଂସୀକରଣ ପାଇଁ ରାଜ୍ୟ ଡ୍ରଗ୍ ଡିସ୍ପୋଜାଲ କମିଟି ନିକଟକୁ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ ପଠାଯାଇଥିଲା।
ଡ୍ରଗ୍ ଡିସ୍ପୋଜାଲ କମିଟି ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଗ୍ରୀନ୍ ସିଗନାଲ୍ ବା ଅନୁମୋଦନ ମିଳିବା ପରେ ଆଜି ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲ୍ଲା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ଶେରଗଡ଼ ଗ୍ରାମ ନିକଟରେ ଧ୍ୱଂସୀକରଣ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ସେଠାରେ ଥିବା ଇଲେକ୍ଟ୍ରି ଚୁଲା  ସାହାଯ୍ୟରେ ଏହି ସମସ୍ତ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇକୁ ପୋଡ଼ି ପାଉଁଶ କରିଦିଆଯାଇଛି।
ଏହି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ସମୟରେ ଡ୍ରଗ୍ ଡିସ୍ପୋଜାଲ କମିଟିର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷଙ୍କ ସମେତ ଗଜପତି ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ଆରକ୍ଷୀ ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ, ଡିଏସ୍‌ପି (ମୁଖ୍ୟାଳୟ), ଡେପୁଟି କଲେକ୍ଟର ଏବଂ ରା. ଉଦୟଗିରି ଥାନାର ଆଇଆଇସି ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ।
ଏହି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ବାବଦରେ ସୂଚନା ଦେଇ ରା. ଉଦୟଗିରି ଏସଡ଼ିପିଓ ରାକେଶ କୁମାର ସାହୁ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ସମସ୍ତ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟାକୁ ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସ୍ୱଚ୍ଛତା, ଉତ୍ତରଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଏବଂ ଆଇନଗତ ନିୟମ କାନୁନର ପରିସର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସୂଚାରୁରୂପେ ସମ୍ପନ୍ନ କରାଯାଇଛି। ପୋଲିସର ଏହି ବଡ଼ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଯୋଗୁ ଅଞ୍ଚଳର ଚୋରା ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ବେପାରୀଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ କୋକୁଆ ଭୟ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ପୋଡ଼ି ପାଉଁଶ ହେଲା ୩,୧୧୬ କିଲୋ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ, NDPS ଆକ୍ଟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: उधर एकनाथ शिंदे का ऑपरेशन टाइगर, इधर फ्लाइट में एक साथ दिखे सीएम फडणवीस और उद्धव ठाकरे; सियासी हलचल तेज
description: Fadnavis-Uddhav Meeting: मुंबई से नागपुर जाते समय मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस और शिवसेना प्रमुख उद्धव ठाकरे एक ही विमान में सफर करते नजर आए। फ्लाइट के दौरान दोनों नेताओं के बीच बातचीत हुई।
content:
Nagpur Flight: महाराष्ट्र की राजनीति से एक बड़ी खबर सामने आ रही है। राज्य के मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस और शिवसेना पार्टी प्रमुख उद्धव ठाकरे ने एक ही प्लेन में सफर किया। वे मुंबई से नागपुर गए। पता चला है कि इस दौरान देवेंद्र फडणवीस और उद्धव ठाकरे के बीच बातचीत हुई। इस प्लेन में आदित्य ठाकरे, संजय राउत, विनायक राउत और अनिल देसाई भी मौजूद दिखे।
ऑपरेशन टाइगर के ज़रिए राज्य के छह MPs ने उद्धव ठाकरे का साथ छोड़ दिया। उसके बाद देवेंद्र फडणवीस और उद्धव ठाकरे को एक ही प्लेन में सफ़र करते देखा गया। इस बीच, खबर है कि देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने उद्धव ठाकरे से कहा कि &#8216;हम मिले हैं, यही बड़ी खबर है।&#8217; पता चला है कि इस मौके पर देवेंद्र फडणवीस और उद्धव ठाकरे ने चर्चा की और दोनों नेताओं ने एक-दूसरे से सवाल किए। यह भी पता चला है कि देवेंद्र फडणवीस और संजय राउत ने भी चर्चा की।
ऑपरेशन टाइगर के बीच गरमाई सियासत
2019 से ही देवेंद्र फडणवीस और उद्धव ठाकरे के बीच राजनीतिक मतभेद पैदा हो गए हैं और उनके राजनीतिक रास्ते अलग हो गए हैं। उसके बाद उद्धव ठाकरे की शिवसेना में बड़ी फूट पड़ गई। लोकसभा चुनाव में नौ MP जीतने के बाद एकनाथ शिंदे ने फिर से उद्धव ठाकरे के छह MP हरा दिए।
ये भी पढ़े:  Quran Law Controversy: क्या आप अपने पति की 4 शादियां करवाएंगी? सना मलिक के बयान पर शाइना एनसी का तीखा सवाल 
मुलाकात बनी चर्चा का विषय
MP बंटवारे के बाद, ऐसा लगता है कि उद्धव ठाकरे ने उन लोकसभा सीटों का दौरा करने का फैसला किया है। उद्धव ठाकरे 27 जून को यवतमाल वाशिम जाने वाले हैं। उस मौके पर वे नागपुर जा रहे हैं। मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस भी उसी फ्लाइट में मौजूद थे। इसलिए, इस पर एक बार फिर चर्चा होने लगी है। इस मौके पर उद्धव ठाकरे के साथ नेता आदित्य ठाकरे, संजय राउत, विनायक राउत, अनिल देसाई मौजूद थे।

title: केंद्रीय कर्मचारियों की लग गई लॉटरी! फिटमेंट फैक्टर पर क्या है नया अपडेट, कितनी बढ़ेगी आपकी बेसिक सैलरी?
description: 8th Pay Commission: देशभर के लाखों केंद्रीय कर्मचारियों और पेंशनर्स की नजरें इस समय आठवें वेतन आयोग पर टिकी हुई हैं, जिसको लेकर आयोग ने अपनी तैयारियां काफी तेज कर दी हैं।
content: 8th Pay Commission Latest Update: देशभर के लाखों केंद्रीय कर्मचारियों और पेंशनर्स की नजरें इस समय आठवें वेतन आयोग पर टिकी हुई हैं, जिसको लेकर आयोग ने अपनी तैयारियां काफी तेज कर दी हैं। आयोग की टीम लगातार विभिन्न राज्यों और केंद्र शासित प्रदेशों का दौरा करके कर्मचारी संगठनों, यूनियनों और सरकारी अधिकारियों से सुझाव ले रही है, जिसके तहत 15 जून तक मेमोरेंडम जमा करने की प्रक्रिया भी पूरी हो चुकी है। इस पूरे मामले में सबसे ज्यादा चर्चा &#8216;फिटमेंट फैक्टर&#8217; को लेकर हो रही है, जो मौजूदा बेसिक सैलरी और पेंशन को नए वेतनमान में बदलने का मुख्य आधार होता है। नेशनल काउंसिल (JCM) और रेलवे सहित कई कर्मचारी यूनियनों ने फिटमेंट फैक्टर को 3.15 से बढ़ाकर 3.83 करने की आक्रामक मांग रखी है, जिससे वर्तमान की न्यूनतम बेसिक सैलरी 18,000 रुपये से सीधे बढ़कर लगभग 68,940 रुपये तक पहुंच सकती है। दूसरी तरफ, केंद्र सरकार के करीब 50 लाख कर्मचारियों और 69 लाख पेंशनर्स पर होने वाले भारी वित्तीय बोझ को देखते हुए सरकार और आयोग बेहद फूंक-फूंक कर कदम रख रहे हैं।

title: निगम के विशेष शिविर में लंबित फाइलों का मौके पर निपटारा
description:
पटियाला : मेयर नगर निगम पटियाला कुंदन गोगिया एवं कमिश्नर पूजा स्याल ग्रेवाल के दिशा-निर्देशों के अनुसार आज नगर निगम पटियाला के डा. आंबेडकर हाल में लंबे समय से लंबित पड़ी एनओसी एवं आवासीय नक्शों और जन्म एवं मृत्यु प्रमाण पत्रों फाइलों के निपटारे और त्वरित समाधान के लिए विशेष सुविधा शिविर आयोजित किया गया। .
The post निगम के विशेष शिविर में लंबित फाइलों का मौके पर निपटारा appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
पटियाला : मेयर नगर निगम पटियाला कुंदन गोगिया एवं कमिश्नर पूजा स्याल ग्रेवाल के दिशा-निर्देशों के अनुसार आज नगर निगम पटियाला के डा. आंबेडकर हाल में लंबे समय से लंबित पड़ी एनओसी एवं आवासीय नक्शों और जन्म एवं मृत्यु प्रमाण पत्रों फाइलों के निपटारे और त्वरित समाधान के लिए विशेष सुविधा शिविर आयोजित किया गया।  शिविर के दौरान बड़ी संख्या में शहरवासियों ने अपनी लंबित फाइलों के निपटारे के लिए पहुंचकर लाभ उठाया।
मौके पर मेयर कुंदन गोगिया, अतिरक्ति कमश्निर सिमरप्रीत कौर एवं संयुक्त कमश्निर मनरीत राणा ने शिविर का निरीक्षण किया तथा अधिकारियों को लोगों के कार्य बिना किसी देरी के निपटाने के निर्देश दिए। एमटीपी नीरज भट्टी ने बताया कि शिविर के दौरान 45 आवासीय नक्शों तथा 15 एनओसी फाइलों का मौके पर निपटारा कर दिया गया। जिन फाइलों में दस्तावेजों की कमी पाई गई, उनके आवेदकों को बल्डिगिं शाखा के अधिकारियों द्वारा आवश्यक दस्तावेजों की जानकारी दी गई, ताकि दस्तावेज पूरे होने के बाद उनकी फाइलों को भी शीघ्र स्वीकृति प्रदान की जा सके।
जन्म एवं मृत्यु प्रमाण पत्रों की लंबित फाइलें खत्म करने के लिए विशेष योजना : 
जन्म एवं मृत्यु शाखा में आयोजित शिविर के दौरान लंबित प्रमाण पत्रों के निपटारे में आ रही समस्याओं की विस्तार से समीक्षा की गई। जन्म एवं मृत्यु शाखा के कार्य को अधिक सुचारु एवं प्रभावी बनाने के लिए कर्मचारियों की मल्टीपल आईडी बनाने के भी नर्दिेश दिए गए। इसके अलावा शाखा की मांग के अनुसार अतिरक्ति स्टाफ तैनात करने का भी नर्णिय लिया गया, ताकि लंबित मामलों का निपटारा और तेजी से किया जा सके।
The post निगम के विशेष शिविर में लंबित फाइलों का मौके पर निपटारा appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Mahaboobnagar | వికటించిన పెళ్లి భోజనం.. పలువురికి వాంతులు..!
description: Mahaboobnagar : మహబూబ్ నగర్‌లోని న్యూ మోతీనగర్‌లో పలువురు అస్వస్థతకు గురయ్యారు. పెళ్లి భోజనం వికటించడంతో 30 మందికిపైగా వాంతులు చేసుకున్నారు.
content:
Mahaboobnagar : మహబూబ్ నగర్‌లోని న్యూ మోతీనగర్‌లో పలువురు అస్వస్థతకు గురయ్యారు. పెళ్లి భోజనం వికటించడంతో 30 మందికిపైగా వాంతులు చేసుకున్నారు. దాంతో, వారిని వెంటనే ప్రభుత్వ ఆస్పత్రికి తరలించి చికిత్స అందిస్తున్నారు. ముప్ఫయి మందికి పైగా అనారోగ్యంతో బాధ పడడానికి కారణం పాడైన పెళ్లి భోజనాలను తినడమే కారణమని తెలిసింది.
గురువారం కొందరు పెళ్లిలో మిగిలిన భోజనాలను న్యూ మోతీనగర్‌ బస్తీవాసులకు ఇచ్చి వెళ్లారు. శుక్రవారం ఆ ఆహారం తిన్నవారు అస్వస్థతకు లోనై వాంతులు చేసుకున్నారు. ఈ ఘటనపై పోలీసులు, వైద్య అధికారులు విచారణ జరుపుతున్నారు.

title: Rivals Devendra Fadnavis, Uddhav Thackeray Share Flight To Nagpur - Video
description: Maharashtra CM Devendra Fadnavis and Uddhav Thackeray shared a flight, sparking buzz, though leaders downplayed it amid tensions over 'Operation Tiger'.
content: Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis and his political rival, Shiv Sena (UBT) president Uddhav Thackeray, travelled together on a flight from Mumbai to Nagpur on Friday. The visual from the flight triggered political chatter. While Fadnavis was seated on one side, Thackeray was on the other side. Thackeray was accompanied by his son and former minister Aaditya and close aide, Rajya Sabha member Sanjay Raut, on the flight to Nagpur, the hometown of Fadnavis.  WhatsApp Video 2026-06-26 at 7 The ruling Mahayuti coalition was quick to dismiss any political significance to the development. BJP MLC Prasad Lad said political rivalry did not make the leaders enemies and said that he was more surprised that Thackeray chose to travel on a regular commercial flight."Although we are political opponents, we are not enemies. We do hold cordial talks. Despite the strained relations between the BJP and the Thackeray-led Shiv Sena (UBT), he (Uddhav) attended my daughter's wedding with his family. We are not adversaries of each other," the ruling party legislator was quoted as saying by PTI. "I am surprised that Uddhav Thackeray is travelling by a general passenger plane. Devendra Fadnavis regularly travels between Mumbai and Nagpur by plane, so there is nothing surprising about his journey," Lad said. Shiv Sena (UBT) leader Sushma Andhare also sought to downplay Fadnavis and the Opposition politician travelling together. "I also don't see any significance in such a meeting. It is a coincidence and nothing more than that," Andhare opined, as per the news agency. This comes as the two sides have been trading barbs over over 'Operation Tiger'. Six Lok Sabha MPs from the Shiv Sena (UBT) recently crossed over to Maharashtra Deputy Chief Minister Eknath Shinde-led Shiv Sena.The Lok Sabha MPs of the Shiv Sena (UBT) who crossed over are: Sanjay Deshmukh (Yavatmal), Sanjay Jadhav (Parbhani), Sanjay Dina Patil (Mumbai North East), Nagesh Patil-Ashtikar (Hingoli), Omprakash Rajenimbalkar (Dharashiv) and Bhausaheb Wakchaure (Shirdi).The dissidents joined the ruling Shiv Sena at an event at the Yashwantrao Chavan Pratishthan in south Mumbai in the presence of its president Shinde and other senior party leaders.(With PTI inputs)

title: ആരാധനാലയങ്ങളിലെ വഞ്ചികൾ കുത്തിപ്പൊളിക്കുന്ന കുപ്രസിദ്ധ കള്ളൻ 'വഞ്ചികുത്തി അനീഷ്' പൂയപ്പള്ളി പൊലീസിന്റെ വലയിൽ!
description: കൊല്ലത്തെ ക്ഷേത്രങ്ങളിലും ആരാധനാലയങ്ങളിലും വഞ്ചികൾ കുത്തിപ്പൊളിച്ച് പണം മോഷ്ടിച്ചിരുന്ന കുപ്രസിദ്ധ കള്ളൻ വഞ്ചികുത്തി അനീഷ് എന്ന അജീഷിനെ പൂയപ്പള്ളി പോലീസ് പിടികൂടി. ദിവസങ്ങൾ നീണ്ട നിരീക്ഷണത്തിനൊടുവിൽ സാഹസികമായാണ് പ്രതിയെ പോലീസ് കീഴ്പ്പെടുത്തിയത്.
content: <p>കൊല്ലം:ക്ഷേത്രങ്ങൾ ഉൾപ്പെടെയുള്ള ആരാധനാലയങ്ങളിലെയും വഞ്ചികൾ കുത്തിപ്പൊളിച്ച് പണം മോഷ്ടിക്കുന്ന കള്ളൻ പിടിയിൽ. വഞ്ചികുത്തിഅനീഷ് എന്നറിയപ്പെടുന്ന ഇളമാട്, കല്ലിയോട് തേവന്നൂർ ചരുവിള പുത്തൻവീട്ടിൽ അജീഷ് (30) നെയാണ് പൂയപ്പള്ളി പൊലീസ് സാഹസിക നീക്കത്തിലൂടെ പിടികൂടിയത്. അമ്പലങ്ങൾക്ക് പുറമെ വ്യാപര സ്ഥാപനങളും കുത്തി തുറന്ന് മോഷണം നടത്തുന്ന അനീഷിനായി പൂയപ്പള്ളി പൊലീസ് വല വിരിച്ചിരിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു.</p><p>ദിവസങ്ങളോളം നീണ്ട നിരീക്ഷണത്തിനൊടുവിൽ അതിരാവിലെ നടത്തിയ അതിസാഹസിക നീക്കത്തിലാണ് പ്രതിയെ പോലീസ് കീഴ്പ്പെടുത്തിയത്. രക്ഷപ്പെടാൻ ശ്രമിച്ചെങ്കിലും തന്ത്രപരമായ നീക്കത്തിന് മുന്നിൽ പ്രതിക്ക് പോലീസിന് മുന്നിൽ കീഴടങ്ങേണ്ടിവന്നു.മാസങ്ങളായി പ്രദേശത്തെ ആരാധനാലയങ്ങളിൽ മോഷണം പതിവായിരുന്നു. പലതും വഞ്ചി കുത്തി തുറന്നുള്ള മോഷണമായതിനാൽ പിന്നിൽ അനീഷ് തന്നയാകുമെന്ന് പോലീസ് ഉറപ്പിച്ചു.</p><p>മീയന നാഗയക്ഷിക്കാവ്, പ്ലാങ്കുഴി മറുത അപ്പൂപ്പൻകാവ് ചെങ്കൂർ, അമ്പലം കുന്ന് വലിയവിള ഭഗവതി ക്ഷേത്രമുൾപ്പെടെ നിരവധി ക്ഷേത്രങ്ങളിലെ വഞ്ചികൾ കുത്തിത്തുറന്ന് കാണിക്കപ്പണം അപഹരിച്ച കേസുകളിൽ ഇയാൾ പ്രതിയാണ്. രാത്രികാലങ്ങളിലാണ് മോഷണം. വഞ്ചികൾ അതിവേഗം പൊളിച്ച് പണം കൈക്കലാക്കി രക്ഷപ്പെടുന്നതിൽ വിദഗ്ധനാണ് അനീഷ് എന്നാണ് അന്വേഷണ ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥർ പറയുന്നത്. എന്നാൽ ചില കേസുകളിൽ പിടിയിലായി ജയിലിലായിട്ടുമുണ്ട്.</p><p>സി.ഐ ഷാജിമോന്റെ നേതൃത്വത്തിലും നിർദ്ദേശപ്രകാരവും എസ്.ഐമാരായ രജനീഷ് മാധവൻ, ബാലാജി എസ്. കുറുപ്പ്, ബിനു ജോർജ്, രാജേഷ്, കൃഷ്ണകുമാർ, മധുസൂദനൻ, സി.പി.ഒമാരായ റിജു, അൻവർ, അജി രാജൻ എന്നിവരടങ്ങിയ പ്രത്യേക സംഘമാണ് പ്രതിയെ പിടികൂടിയത്. അറസ്റ്റിലായ പ്രതിയെ കോടതിയിൽ ഹാജരാക്കിയ ശേഷം റിമാൻഡ് ചെയ്തു.</p>

title: Ketan Agrawal Murder Case: Siya, Chetan Deleted Chats Before and After Alleged Murder, Say Cops
description: The investigation into Pune realtor Ketan Agrawal's alleged murder reveals that the accused, Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary, deleted chat messages from their phones both before and after the crime to eliminate evidence.
content: Police investigating the alleged murder of Pune-based realtor Ketan Agrawal have claimed that the two accused, Siya Goyal and her alleged lover Chetan Chaudhary, deleted chat messages from their mobile phones both before and after the crime in an alleged attempt to destroy evidence.According to investigators, the accused erased conversations from their respective phones before the alleged murder and again after Ketan was pushed off a cliff at Maharashtra's Lohagad Fort on June 18. Police are examining digital evidence to recover the deleted chats as part of the ongoing investigation.Siya Goyal (20) and Chetan Chaudhary (22), who were allegedly in a relationship, are accused of conspiring to kill 25-year-old Ketan Agrawal. Investigators claim Siya did not want to marry Ketan despite their wedding being scheduled for November and allegedly planned the murder with Chetan.The case was initially treated as an accidental death after Ketan fell from a cliff during a trek at Lohagad Fort. However, the investigation later took a dramatic turn, with police alleging that the murder had been planned for months and that two earlier attempts had failed before the June 18 incident.In a parallel development, the Maharashtra government has accepted the Agarwal family's demand for a speedy trial. Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis has approved the appointment of senior advocate Ujjwal Nikam as the special public prosecutor to represent the state in the case.Meanwhile, Ketan's father, Vishal Agrawal, rejected reports suggesting that his son's wig was a reason behind the alleged crime. He said both Siya and her family knew before the engagement that Ketan wore a small wig patch and questioned the alleged motive, saying, "If she had any issue, she should have said no. What was the need to kill my son?"“Our investigation has shown that both the accused deleted their chats from their phones before June 18 and again after the Lohgad incident,” said a police officer, who is a part of the investigation.He said that the devices have been sent to a forensic laboratory for analysis and retrieval of the messages.According to the police, Siya and Chetan had exchanged a staggering 2,004 phone calls, spending 238 hours talking to each other.On the day of the incident, the two allegedly met at a cafe and discussed the plan to eliminate Ketan, even identifying a suitable spot on the fort from where the realtor could be pushed, a police officer had said earlier.Meanwhile, Pune rural police summoned Siya’s brother for questioning. “Her other members and friends will also be summoned. So far, the roles of both Siya and Chetan have been established in the alleged murder of Ketan,” said Gajanan Tonpe, Deputy Superintendent of Police (Lonavala division) of Pune rural police.Earlier in the day, police said that Chetan had provoked Siya to eliminate Ketan. Chetan initially claimed that he was present at the fort but did not go to the spot where Ketan was pushed off the cliff, and did not know exactly what happened, the official had said.“However, it was evident that he was lying,” he said, adding that both of them finally admitted to their roles and narrated the entire sequence of events.As per the plan, Siya was to give a signal by sitting down, following which Chetan was to come up and push Ketan to his death. They executed the plan exactly, the official said.“They have told us what happened and how it happened. Ketan had no idea what was coming,” the official had said.Meanwhile, Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis on Friday assured Ketan’s family that the government would ensure strict punishment to those responsible and spare no effort in securing justice.Fadnavis also accepted the Agarwal family’s demand to try the case in a fast-track court and the appointment of top lawyer Ujjwal Nikam.“We met Fadnavis ji and sought a speedy trial in the case. We also sought that the truth should be unravelled, and if there are any other people involved, they should also be booked. All those responsible for the murder of my son should get severe punishment,” said Vishal Agarwal.Siya’s mother has claimed that her daughter was reluctant to visit Lohagad Fort on June 18, but Ketan and his mother persuaded her to make the trip.“On the evening of June 17, Siya and Ketan had a video call, during which Ketan asked her to accompany him to Lohagad. During the call, Ketan’s mother also spoke to Siya and urged her to join him. Siya told her that she did not want to go trekking, as there was a function scheduled for the following day and she wanted to rest,” her mother claimed.(With Inputs from PTI)

title: One chart explains the economy’s terrible baby boomer hangover, Gen X’s invisibility, and millennial and Gen Z irrelevance
description: New Census data shows the 65+ population grew 16.2% since 2020 — nearly triple the rate of millennials — as younger generations scatter to exurban fringes.
content:
The Census Bureau is out with new data, documenting how America has grown over the past six years — or not. One takeaway is clear: the Baby Boomer generation is so massive and has such a stranglehold on the economy that essentially no part of the country is seeing any real population growth among younger people. The only, partial exception is in exurban areas in the Sun Belt, where regulations encourage affordability for young Americans starting out in their careers.



Just consider one fact: 39.4 the age of the average American. That’s the median age as of July 2025, up from 38.6 just five years ago. Half the country is now on the far side of 40. And buried inside the Census Bureau’s freshly released Vintage 2025 population estimates is a map of how America got here.



The data, released Thursday, tells a story about four generations and one fundamental imbalance: a country whose dominant demographic cohort is exiting productive economic life while retaining nearly all of its productive economic assets — and where every generation in its wake is either too small, too dispersed, or too financially constrained to fill the void.



America has an economic boomer hangover — the data is plain to see.






The pig in the python



It’s well known that baby boomers dominate most of the traditional statistics of economic empowerment. The generation owns one third of the nation’s housing stock and are responsible for most homebuying activity. They remain largely in control of the country’s political machine, despite the cohort’s youngest now having aged well into their 60s. The sheer size of the demographic and its staying power has also reshaped labor markets—possibly for the foreseeable future, by distorting the need for workers junior to them.



But the Census data make it overwhelmingly clear: In every region of the U.S., boomers have become more entrenched over the past few years while most other demographic groups have struggled to grow. And spare a thought for Gen X or anyone under the age of 18, who are losing ever more ground in the country’s demographic makeup. It’s the lingering effect of what Russell Baker, a New York Times humorist, termed “pigs in a python” in the 1970s. Baby boomers (the pigs) have spent decades moving through the U.S. economy (python), distorting everything in their path and leaving behind something unrecognizable.



Between 2020 and 2025, the number of people older than 65 rose 16.2%, according to the Census. The number of people between the ages of 25 and 44, broadly in line with the millennial cohort, increased 5.9%. Young adults barely held on to their ranks, with the 18-24 age range only rising 2.1%. 



The country is underwater, meanwhile, when it comes to kids and oft-neglected Gen Xers. The number of under-18-year-olds in the U.S. dipped 2.4%, while the population aged 45 to 64 declined 3.2%. These two demographic groups are shrinking in every part of the country except the South, the only corner of the U.S. that seems to be growing consistently at all. The region’s under-18 population grew 1.1%, while the number of Gen X-aged Americans rose a fractional 0.1%.



In the Census Bureau’s regional age breakdown, the South is the only region in the country that grew in all five age cohorts — children, young adults, early-career adults, midlife adults, and retirees — between April 2020 and July 2025. Every other region bled population in at least two categories, often more.



The South grew by 6% over that period. The nation as a whole grew by 3.1%.



The Northeast lost 4.1% of its under-18 population and 7.1% of its 45-to-64-year-olds — the steepest midlife decline of any region. The Midwest shed 3.9% of its children and 6.2% of its midlife cohort. The West, long the country’s demographic frontier, posted the worst child-population decline of any region: -5.7%.



“Regional age patterns are changing for a few key reasons,” said Lauren Bowers, chief of the Census Bureau’s Population Estimates branch. “The continued transition of baby boomers into retirement age, compounded by local migration and fertility patterns, is shifting the demographic makeup of the country.”



The Invisible Generation



There is a cohort in the middle of all of this that rarely gets a headline. Gen X — born roughly between 1965 and 1980, now aged 45 to 61 — maps almost precisely onto the Census Bureau’s 45-to-64 age bracket. And that bracket is shrinking in three of the country’s four regions: down 7.1% in the Northeast, 6.2% in the Midwest, 2.7% in the West. The South is the sole exception, and barely: a gain of 0.1%, roughly 19,000 people.



As the successors to baby boomers, Gen X never really stood a chance. The cohort was born during a period of plummeting fertility rates and changes to immigration policy. At around 65 million, the generation is smaller than both the baby boomers and the millennials that succeeded them. Statisticians have even referred to Gen X as the country’s forgotten “middle child,” given their ongoing struggle for relevance in demographic maps and the economy at large.



Gen X was always the overlooked cohort — sandwiched between the boomer cultural colossus and the millennial media obsession. Demographically, they are simply too small, compared to 76 million boomers and 72 million millennials. There weren’t enough of them to sustain regional population bases as boomers aged out, and there aren’t enough of them now to absorb the institutional, economic, and political weight that boomers are vacating.



They are also, in a quiet and underappreciated way, the load-bearing generation of the current American economy. Gen Xers are running the middle and upper-middle layers of corporate America — the VP floors, the managing director ranks, the regional leadership roles — while boomers hold on to the corner offices and millennials wait in line. When boomers finally cede control, Gen X won’t have the numbers to hold it for long.



Not all of the Census findings were necessarily surprises. The postwar boom in birth rates yielded one of the largest generations of all time as a share of the country at large. By the time the last baby boomer was born in 1964, the cohort comprised more than a third of the entire U.S. population. As immigrants added to the generation’s ranks over the years, baby boomers peaked in the 1990s at a massive 79 million.



The Peripheral Majority



Millennials — roughly 25 to 44 years old today — are the largest living generation in America. They are also, by the evidence of this data, the most economically sidelined.



The 25-to-44 cohort is growing fastest in the South. But that growth is concentrated in outlying metro counties — the exurban fringes of cities like Atlanta, Charlotte, Dallas, and Nashville. 



“The South’s growth from 2020 to 2025 has been particularly prominent in its metro areas’ outlying counties,” Bowers noted. “These outlying counties grew the fastest across all age groups, and often by a large margin, suggesting that they are attracting or retaining people of all ages.”



Why would that be? The economic answer is obvious. Millennials didn’t move to the exurbs of Raleigh and San Antonio because of opportunity. They moved because they were priced out of the cities where boomers own the housing stock and Gen X anchors the professional networks. The largest generation in American history is diffusing into economic margins, gaining square footage and losing proximity to power.



America’s aging population comes with real stakes for the country’s economy and political scene, a shift compounded by the steep decline in young populations almost anywhere in the country. But for now, the U.S. demographic shift is mostly representative of a baby boomer generation that remolded the country in its image, and of younger generations struggling to carve a piece out of it.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: दमोह में मोहर्रम के शहर गश्त के दौरान टला बड़ा हादसा; आग से खेल रहे युवक का मुंह जला- देखें VIDEO
description: Damoh Moharram Fire Stunt: दमोह में मुहर्रम जुलूस के दौरान हादसा, पेट्रोल से आग उगलने का स्टंट करते समय युवक के मुंह और गले में लगी आग, गंभीर हालत में जबलपुर मेडिकल कॉलेज रेफर।
content:
Accident In Damoh During Fire Stunt: मध्य प्रदेश के दमोह जिले में मोहर्रम के अवसर पर निकाले जा रहे ताजिया जुलूस के दौरान एक बड़ा हादसा होते-होते टल गया। शहर गश्त के दौरान आग उगलने का स्टंट कर रहे एक युवक के मुंह और गले में आग लग गई, जिससे वह गंभीर रूप से झुलस गया।
घटना के बाद मौके पर अफरातफरी मच गई। स्थानीय लोगों ने तुरंत उसे प्राथमिक उपचार दिलाया, जिसके बाद बेहतर इलाज के लिए जबलपुर रेफर किया गया। इस घटना का वीडियो अब सोशल मीडिया पर तेजी से वायरल हो रहा है।
परंपरा के दौरान किया जा रहा था आग उगलने का स्टंट
जानकारी के अनुसार, मोहर्रम की परंपरा के तहत दमोह शहर में ताजियों की शहर गश्त निकाली जा रही थी। इस दौरान गड़ी मोहल्ले में परंपरा के अनुसार एक बड़ी मशाल जलाई गई, जिसमें लोग तेल डाल रहे थे। इसी दौरान कुछ युवक मशाल के सामने पेट्रोल मुंह में भरकर आग उगलने का स्टंट कर रहे थे। शुरुआत में यह प्रदर्शन सामान्य रहा, लेकिन कुछ ही देर बाद एक युवक के साथ बड़ा हादसा हो गया।

आग से स्टंट करते युवक के मुंह में लगी आग,
मोहर्रम में युवक को स्टंट करना पड़ा महंगा
Odisha Resign #KetanAgarwal #WelcomeToTheJungle #AyodhyaMeinKejriwal #OBSIDIANRANK1 #OBSIDIANRANK1 #RamMandir #ChadhavaScam #moharam #madhypradesh @Damoh #DevendraFadnavis pic.twitter.com/fS7F3FQ1ap
— अनिल भारद्वाज (@Anil000789) June 26, 2026

चौथी बार स्टंट करते समय लगी मुंह में आग
प्रत्यक्षदर्शियों के मुताबिक युवक ने तीन बार सफलतापूर्वक आग उगली, लेकिन चौथी बार जैसे ही उसने पेट्रोल मुंह में भरकर मशाल की ओर फूंक मारी, अचानक उसके मुंह में आग भड़क गई। देखते ही देखते आग की लपटें उसके मुंह से बाहर निकलने लगीं। मौके पर मौजूद लोगों ने बाहरी आग तो बुझा दी, लेकिन पेट्रोल मुंह और गले के भीतर तक पहुंचने के कारण अंदरूनी हिस्सों में भी आग से गंभीर जलन हो गई। इसके बाद युवक को तत्काल स्थानीय चिकित्सक के पास ले जाया गया।
जबलपुर में इलाज जारी, वायरल हुआ घटना का वीडियो
प्राथमिक उपचार के बाद डॉक्टरों ने युवक की गंभीर स्थिति को देखते हुए उसे मध्य प्रदेश के जबलपुर रेफर कर दिया, जहां उसका उपचार जारी है। घटना के दौरान मौके पर मौजूद कुछ लोगों ने पूरे घटनाक्रम का वीडियो अपने मोबाइल फोन में रिकॉर्ड कर लिया।
यह भी पढ़ें: सागर में डॉग स्क्वायड के साथ बस स्टैंड-रेलवे स्टेशन पर सघन चेकिंग; मुहर्रम से पहले पुलिस हाई-अलर्ट
वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर तेजी से वायरल हो रहा है। हालांकि प्रशासन की ओर से लोगों से धार्मिक आयोजनों के दौरान जोखिम भरे स्टंट से बचने और सुरक्षा नियमों का पालन करने की अपील की जा रही है। यह घटना एक बार फिर ऐसे खतरनाक प्रदर्शनों से जुड़े जोखिमों की ओर ध्यान आकर्षित करती है।

title: Rajkummar Rao: ମୁକ୍ତିଲାଭ କଲା ରାଜକୁମାର ରାଓଙ୍କ ‘ପ୍ରହାର’ ଟିଜର
description:
ମୁମ୍ବାଇ: ବଲିଉଡ୍‌ ଅଭିନେତା ରାଜକୁମାର ରାଓଙ୍କ ଆଗାମୀ ଫିଲ୍ମ ‘ପ୍ରହାର: ଦ ଉଜ୍ଜ୍ୱଳ ନିକମ ଷ୍ଟୋରି’ର ଟିଜର ମୁକ୍ତି ପାଇଛି। ଟିଜର ମୁକ୍ତି ପାଇବା ପରେ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆରେ ଏହାକୁ ନେଇ ଭଲ ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳୁଛି। ବିଶେଷ କରି ଉଜ୍ଜ୍ୱଳ ନିକମଙ୍କ ଚରିତ୍ରରେ ରାଜକୁମାର ରାଓଙ୍କ ରୂପ, ଅଭିନୟ ଓ ସଂଳାପ ଦର୍ଶକଙ୍କ ମନ ଜିତିଛି।
‘ଅପରେସନ୍ ସିନ୍ଦୂର’ରେ ସହିଦ ହୋଇଥିବା ୬ ଭାରତୀୟ ସେନା ଯବାନଙ୍କ ନାମ ସରକାରୀ ଭାବେ ପ୍ରକାଶିତ
ଏହି ଫିଲ୍ମ ଦେଶର ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ ସରକାରୀ ଓକିଲ ଉଜ୍ଜ୍ୱଳ ନିକମଙ୍କ ଜୀବନ ଓ ତାଙ୍କର ଆଇନଗତ ଲଢ଼େଇକୁ ଆଧାର କରି ନିର୍ମାଣ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଟିଜରରେ ୨୦୦୮ ମସିହାର ମୁମ୍ବାଇ ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପରେ ଧରାପଡ଼ିଥିବା ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଅଜମଲ କସାବଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଚାଲିଥିବା ମାମଲାର କିଛି ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ଦେଖାଯାଇଛି। ଟିଜରରେ ନ୍ୟାୟ ପାଇଁ ଉଜ୍ଜ୍ୱଳ ନିକମଙ୍କ ଦୃଢ଼ ଲଢ଼େଇକୁ ଖୁବ୍ ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ ଭାବରେ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ଟିଜର ଦେଖିବା ପରେ ଅନେକ ଦର୍ଶକ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆରେ ରାଜକୁମାର ରାଓଙ୍କ ଅଭିନୟର ଖୁବ୍ ପ୍ରଶଂସା କରିଛନ୍ତି। କେହି ତାଙ୍କ ରୂପାନ୍ତରକୁ ଅଦ୍ଭୁତ ବୋଲି କହିଥିବା ବେଳେ, ଆଉ କେହି ଏହାକୁ ତାଙ୍କ କ୍ୟାରିୟରର ସର୍ବଶ୍ରେଷ୍ଠ ଅଭିନୟ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଗୋଟିଏ ବୋଲି ମତ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଏହା ସହ ଫିଲ୍ମଟିକୁ ନେଇ ଦର୍ଶକଙ୍କ ଉତ୍ସାହ ଆହୁରି ବଢ଼ିଯାଇଛି। ଏହି ଫିଲ୍ମରେ ୱାମିକା ଗବ୍ବି, ଜୟଦୀପ ଆହଲାୱତ, ସିକନ୍ଦର ଖେର ଓ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ କଳାକାର ମଧ୍ୟ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଭୂମିକାରେ ଅଛନ୍ତି। ‘ପ୍ରହାର: ଦ ଉଜ୍ଜ୍ୱଳ ନିକମ ଷ୍ଟୋରି’ ଆସନ୍ତା ୭ ଅଗଷ୍ଟରେ ସାରା ଦେଶର ସିନେମା ହଲ୍‌ରେ ମୁକ୍ତି ପାଇବ।

title: Delhi to Seal Coaching Centres Violating Safety Norms: Education Minister Ashish Sood
description: The Delhi government has constituted a committee to regulate coaching centres and ensure compliance with safety and building norms, warning that institutes found violating prescribed standards will face permanent sealing after inspection and audit.
content: Delhi government has formed a committee under the Director Technical Education to ensure that all coaching centres running in the capital city follow a set of guidelines. The government has also stated that if any coaching centre is found to be flouting the rules, the coaching centre in question will be sealed permanently.Delhi Education Minister Ashish Sood said the Rekha Gupta-led government will conduct the inspections of coaching centres to ensure compliance with safety measures as well as building regulations. The decision has been taken on the basis of the recommendations of the Justice Gauba Committee, Sood added."In view of the recommendations of the Justice Gauba Committee, we had formed a committee under the Director Technical Education to make its regulations and make a law. How will the coaching centre run? Some coaching centres are charging one lakh rupees, some are charging four lakh rupees. They are not getting quality education and their studies are being done arbitrarily and at dangerous locations...In view of the unfortunate incidents that have taken place in nearby states too, we have inspected the buildings of these nine hundred and twenty-four coaching centers in a month and have directed the corporation to make them a nodal agency and investigate it and based on this investigation, those who do not follow the standards will be sealed and given a notice and an audit will be conducted within a month..." Sood was quoted saying by ANI.Meanwhile, Sood also commented on the issue of NCERT introducing a section on Emergency in Class 9 textbook. The National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) on June 25 introduced the ‘Emergency’ topic in the Class 9 Social Science textbook.Sood defended the move saying, "Better late than never...How were people taken away from their homes overnight? Detained in police stations for months without charges...The current generation should know all these things and these incidents of emergency so that they can be prepared to protect what freedom of expression is in the country today, and how valuable it is."

title: 'ഇതൊരു വലിയ പാഠം', അയർലൻഡിനെതിരായ നാണംകെട്ട തോൽവിക്കു ശേഷം പിഴവുകൾ എണ്ണിപ്പറഞ്ഞ് ശ്രേയസ്
description: മൈതാനത്തിറങ്ങി വെറുതെ മത്സരങ്ങൾ ജയിക്കാം എന്ന് ആരും കരുതേണ്ട. അതിനായി കഠിനാധ്വാനം ചെയ്യണം.സാഹചര്യങ്ങളെയും എതിരാളികളെയും ഒരിക്കലും നിസ്സാരമായി കാണരുത്.
content: <p><strong>ബെൽഫാസ്റ്റ്: </strong>ഇന്ത്യൻ ക്രിക്കറ്റിലെ ശ്രേയസ് അയ്യർ യുഗത്തിന് നിരാശാജനമായ തുടക്കം. ആദ്യ ടി20 മത്സരത്തിൽ ലോകചാമ്പ്യന്മാരായ ഇന്ത്യയെ 34 റൺസിന് തകർത്ത് അയർലൻഡ് അവിശ്വസനീയ വിജയം സ്വന്തമാക്കിയതിന് പിന്നാലെ തോല്‍വിക്ക് ഒഴികഴിവുകൾ പറയാൻ ക്യാപ്റ്റൻ ശ്രേയസ് അയ്യർ മുതിര്‍ന്നില്ല. ടീമിന്‍റെ മോശം പ്രകടനത്തെ ശ്രേയസ് മത്സരശേഷം കടുത്ത ഭാഷയിൽ വിമർശിച്ചു.</p><p>ക്രിക്കറ്റിൽ ഒന്നും മുൻകൂട്ടി പ്രവചിക്കാൻ കഴിയില്ല. മൈതാനത്തിറങ്ങി വെറുതെ മത്സരങ്ങൾ ജയിക്കാം എന്ന് ആരും കരുതേണ്ട. അതിനായി കഠിനാധ്വാനം ചെയ്യണം. സാഹചര്യങ്ങളെയും എതിരാളികളെയും ഒരിക്കലും നിസ്സാരമായി കാണരുത്. കൃത്യമായി പ്ലാനുകൾ നടപ്പിലാക്കാൻ കഴിഞ്ഞാൽ മാത്രമേ വിജയിക്കാനാകൂവെന്നും ശ്രേയസ് വ്യക്തമാക്കി. നായകനായുള്ള ആദ്യ മത്സരത്തിൽ തന്നെ നാണംകെട്ട തോൽവി വഴങ്ങിയെങ്കിലും ഇതൊരു നല്ല പാഠമാണെന്നാണ് ശ്രേയസ് പറഞ്ഞു.</p><p>മത്സരത്തിന്‍റെ തുടക്കത്തിൽ നമ്മുടെ ബോളർമാർ മികച്ച രീതിയിലാണ് പന്തെറിഞ്ഞത്. എന്നാൽ മധ്യ ഓവറുകളിൽ പ്ലാനുകൾ നടപ്പിലാക്കുന്നതിൽ ഞങ്ങൾക്ക് പിഴച്ചു. ബൗണ്ടറികൾ ചെറുതായ വശങ്ങളിലേക്ക് അവർക്ക് അനായാസം സിക്സറുകൾ അടിക്കാൻ നമ്മൾ അവസരമൊരുക്കി. അവരെ 140 റൺസിൽ ഒതുക്കേണ്ടതായിരുന്നു. എങ്കിലും ഇത്തരം സാഹചര്യങ്ങളിൽ കളിക്കാൻ കഴിഞ്ഞത് വലിയൊരു അനുഭവമാണ്. ക്യാപ്റ്റനെന്ന നിലയിൽ എനിക്കിത് മികച്ചൊരു തുടക്കമണ്, ഇതിൽ നിന്ന് ഒരുപാട് കാര്യങ്ങൾ പഠിക്കാനുണ്ടെന്നും അയ്യർ കൂട്ടിച്ചേർത്തു.</p><p>മത്സരത്തിൽ ടോസ് നേടിയ ഇന്ത്യൻ ക്യാപ്റ്റൻ ശ്രേയസ് അയ്യർ ബോളിങ് തിരഞ്ഞെടുക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. ക്യാപ്റ്റൻ ലൊർക്കൻ ടക്കറുടെ അർധസെഞ്ചുറിയുടെയും ഗാരെത് ഡെലാനിയുടെ (49) തകർപ്പൻ ഇന്നിംഗ്സിന്റെയും കരുത്തിൽ അയർലൻഡ് 182 റൺസെന്ന ശക്തമായ സ്കോർ പടുത്തുയർത്തി. ഇന്ത്യക്കായി ഹർഷിത് റാണ 3 വിക്കറ്റ് വീഴ്ത്തി.</p><p>മറുപടി ബാറ്റിംഗിൽ രണ്ടാം ഓവറിൽ തന്നെ സഞ്ജു സാംസൺ പുറത്തായത് ഇന്ത്യയ്ക്ക് വലിയ തിരിച്ചടിയായി. എന്നാൽ 19 പന്തിൽ ഫിഫ്റ്റിയടിച്ച അഭിഷേക് ശർമ്മ ഇന്ത്യയെ മത്സരത്തിലേക്ക് തിരികെ കൊണ്ടുവന്നെങ്കിലും മറ്റു ബാറ്റർമാരിൽ നിന്ന് പിന്തുണ ലഭിച്ചില്ല. അഭിഷേക് പുറത്തായതോടെ കൃത്യമായ ഇടവേളകളിൽ വിക്കറ്റുകൾ വീഴ്ത്തി അയർലൻഡ് മത്സരം കൈപ്പിടിയിലൊതുക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. ഈ വിജയത്തോടെ രണ്ട് മത്സരങ്ങളുടെ പരമ്പരയിൽ അയർലൻഡ് 1-0 ന് മുന്നിലെത്തി.</p><p><span><strong>ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് ന്യൂസ് ലൈവ് കാണാന്‍ ഇവിടെ ക്ലിക് ചെയ്യുക</strong></span></p>

title: NZ vs ENG | డకెట్ శతకమోత.. ధీటుగా బదులిస్తున్న ఇంగ్లండ్..!
description: NZ vs ENG : సిరీస్ విజేతను నిర్ణయించే మూడో టెస్టులో ఇంగ్లండ్ ధీటుగా ఆడుతోంది. బజ్‌బాల్ ఆటతో అలరించిన ఓపెనర్ బెన్ డకెట్‌(113) శతకంతో రెచ్చిపోగా.. జాకబ్ బెథెల్‌(63 నాటౌట్) అర్ధ శతకంతో కదం తొక్కాడు
content:
NZ vs ENG : సిరీస్ విజేతను నిర్ణయించే మూడో టెస్టులో ఇంగ్లండ్ ధీటుగా ఆడుతోంది. బజ్‌బాల్ ఆటతో అలరించిన ఓపెనర్ బెన్ డకెట్‌(113) శతకంతో రెచ్చిపోగా.. జాకబ్ బెథెల్‌(63 నాటౌట్) అర్ధ శతకంతో కదం తొక్కాడు. వీరిద్దరి విధ్వంసంతో న్యూజిలాండ్‌ బౌలర్లు నీరుగారిపోగా.. ఆతిథ్య జట్టు స్కోర్ బోర్డు పరుగులు పెట్టింది. సొంతమైదానంలో డకెట్ సెంచరీకి.. బెథెల్ మెరుపులు తోడవ్వగా.. 33 ఓవర్లలోనే రెండు వికెట్ల నష్టానికి 188 రన్స్ కొట్టింది ఇంగ్లండ్. చేతిలో ఎనిమిది వికెట్లు ఉండడంతో మ్యాచ్‌పై పట్టు సాధించేలా కనిపిస్తోంది బెన్ స్టోక్స్ సేన.
నాటింగ్‌హమ్ టెస్టులో ఇంగ్లండ్ పుంజుకుంది. తొలిరోజు న్యూజిలాండ్ బ్యాటర్ల ధాటికి డస్సిపోయిన బౌలర్లు రెండోరోజు రాణించారు. అలవోకగా ఐదొందలు కొట్టేలా కనిపించిన కివీస్‌ అనూహ్యంగా 438కే ఆలౌటవ్వగా.. ఓపెనర్ బెన్ డకెట్(113) తన స్టయిల్ విధ్వంసంతో ఇంగ్లండ్ స్కోర్ బోర్డును ఉరికించాడు.

Jacob Bethell’s scores in England’s first innings of a Test:
10, 16, 12, 6, 1, 10, 6, 9, 𝟱𝟬*
Finally, a first-innings fifty!  #ENGvNZ pic.twitter.com/UZGmlceAX8
— Cricinfo (@cricinfo) June 26, 2026

మరో ఓపెనర్ ఎమిలియో గే(0) డకౌటైనా.. జాకబ్ బెథెల్‌(63 నాటౌట్) జతగా కివీస్ బౌలర్లపై విరుచుకుపడిన డకెట్ బజ్ బాల్ ఆటను రూచి చూపించాడు. మెరుపు వేగంతో ఆడిన అతడు సెంచరీతో .. బెథెల్ అర్ధ శతకంతో రాణించగా ఇంగ్లండ్ ధీటుగా బదులిస్తోంది. మరో 24 ఓవర్ల ఆట మిగిలి ఉండడంతో స్టోక్స్ సేన మూడొందలు కొట్టడం ఖాయమనిపిస్తోంది.

You Can't Take Anything For Granted: Iyer's Stern Message After Shocking Defeat vs Ireland
description: Shreyas Iyer sent a stern message to Team India following the shocking defeat against Ireland in Belfast. Iyer-led India failed to chase a target of 183 in the series opener.
content: India T20I captain Shreyas Iyer sent a stern message to the team following the shocking defeat against Ireland in the first T20I of the two-match series. The Men in Blue failed to chase a big target of 183. India never looked in contention despite Ahbishek Sharma's quick half-century and fell short by 34 runs in the end. Iyer, who captained India for the first time, asked his team to work hard and stay in the present ahead of the second game."Initially, the bowlers were bowling venom. But in between, we lost the execution and let them hit us straight down the ground, where the boundaries are smaller. I thought 140 would have been a good score to chase, given the start we had with the ball. But yeah, great start as a captain. Definitely, we are going to forget what happened and there's lot to learn from this game. Going to come out all guns blazing in the next game," Iyer said."The fast bowlers were getting help at the start, and Shivam bowls crucial overs so I always trust him. Harshit Rana bowled phenomenally well, coming back from injury. (His message to the team) You can't take anything for granted. You have to turn up and work hard and stay in the present and if you have the opportunity to squeeze the opponent, you have to do that," Iyer added.India were on top in the early overs as Ireland were reeling at 115/5 after 14.3 overs. Gareth Delany, who was dropped for 8 runs by Abhishek Sharma, took Ireland past the 150-run mark and smashed 49 off 32 balls. His knock proved to be a game-changer and Ireland registered their first-ever win over India.Second T20I details  The second and last T20I of the series will be played at the same venue (Civil Service Cricket Club in Belfast) on Sunday (June 28). The match will start at 6:00 PM IST. A win there will see India level the series while a defeat will see them lose the series.India are unlikely to make any changes in their top order for the must-win game, which means no debut for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi again. He remained on the bench despite a dream run in IPL 2026, where he won the Orange Cap for piling up 776 runs.

title: India vs Ireland | আয়ারল্যান্ডের কাছে ধরাশায়ী ভারত! বেলফাস্টে টি-টোয়েন্টিতে ব্যাটিং-বোলিং বিপর্যয়ে ৩৪ রানে হারল বিশ্বজয়ীরা
description:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্কঃ আয়ারল্যান্ডের বিরুদ্ধে টি-টোয়েন্টি সিরিজের শুরুতেই ধাক্কা খেল টিম ইন্ডিয়া (India vs Ireland)। নতুন অধিনায়ক শ্রেয়স আইয়ারের নেতৃত্বে প্রথম ম্যাচে ভারতের বোলার ও ব্যাটার—উভয় বিভাগই ব্যর্থ। আয়ারল্যান্ডের ১৮২ রানের জবাবে ভারত গুটিয়ে গেল মাত্র ১৪৮ রানে। ৩৪ রানে ম্যাচ জিতে সিরিজে এগিয়ে রইল আইরিশরা। টস জিতে প্রথমে ফিল্ডিংয়ের সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছিলেন শ্রেয়স। মেঘলা […]
The post India vs Ireland | আয়ারল্যান্ডের কাছে ধরাশায়ী ভারত! বেলফাস্টে টি-টোয়েন্টিতে ব্যাটিং-বোলিং বিপর্যয়ে ৩৪ রানে হারল বিশ্বজয়ীরা   appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
উত্তরবঙ্গ সংবাদ অনলাইন ডেস্কঃ আয়ারল্যান্ডের বিরুদ্ধে টি-টোয়েন্টি সিরিজের শুরুতেই ধাক্কা খেল টিম ইন্ডিয়া (India vs Ireland)। নতুন অধিনায়ক শ্রেয়স আইয়ারের নেতৃত্বে প্রথম ম্যাচে ভারতের বোলার ও ব্যাটার—উভয় বিভাগই ব্যর্থ। আয়ারল্যান্ডের ১৮২ রানের জবাবে ভারত গুটিয়ে গেল মাত্র ১৪৮ রানে। ৩৪ রানে ম্যাচ জিতে সিরিজে এগিয়ে রইল আইরিশরা।
টস জিতে প্রথমে ফিল্ডিংয়ের সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছিলেন শ্রেয়স। মেঘলা আবহাওয়ায় বোলাররা সুইং কাজে লাগাতে ব্যর্থ হন। বিশেষ করে প্রসিদ্ধ কৃষ্ণার বোলিং ছিল হতাশাজনক। ৪ ওভারে কোনো উইকেট না পেয়ে তিনি খরচ করলেন ৫৭ রান, যার মধ্যে এক ওভারেই এল ২৭ রান। তবে চোট কাটিয়ে ফেরা হর্ষিত রানা উজ্জ্বল ছিলেন (২৪ রানে ৩ উইকেট)। এছাড়াও অর্শদীপ সিং (২৮ রানে ২) ও অক্ষর প্যাটেল (৩৩ রানে ২) নিয়ন্ত্রিত বোলিং করলেও, শেষ পর্যন্ত লরকান টাকারের হাফসেঞ্চুরিতে আয়ারল্যান্ড ৯ উইকেটে ১৮২ রানের চ্যালেঞ্জিং লক্ষ্যমাত্রা দাঁড় করায়।
জবাবে ব্যাট করতে নেমে শুরুতেই চাপে পড়ে ভারত। সঞ্জু স্যামসন, ইশান কিষান ও অধিনায়ক শ্রেয়স আইয়ার দ্রুত প্যাভিলিয়নে ফেরেন। একমাত্র অভিষেক শর্মা চেনা ছন্দে ছিলেন, তিনি ২০ বলে ৫০ রানের ঝোড়ো ইনিংস খেলেন। কিন্তু তিলক বর্মা (১৯) ও ওয়াশিংটন সুন্দর (৯) রান তোলার গতি ধরে রাখতে ব্যর্থ হন। শেষে শিবম দুবে (২৫) ও অক্ষর প্যাটেল (১৫) কিছুটা লড়ার চেষ্টা করলেও, কোনো ফিনিশার না থাকায় ২০ ওভারের আগেই ১৪৮ রানে অলআউট হয়ে যায় ভারত। ম্যাথু হলার্ড ৩ ও জয় মুন্দ্রা ২ উইকেট নেন।
১৫ বছরের বিস্ময় বালক বৈভব সূর্যবংশীর অভিষেক না হওয়া নিয়ে এখন তুঙ্গে বিতর্ক। অনেকে প্রশ্ন তুলছেন, বৈভবকে খেলালে কি ছবিটা অন্যরকম হতে পারত? অধিনায়ক শ্রেয়সের যুক্তি ছিল অভিজ্ঞদের ওপর আস্থা রাখা। কিন্তু এই ব্যর্থতার পর দ্বিতীয় ম্যাচে বৈভবের সুযোগ হয় কি না, সেটাই এখন দেখার বিষয়।
অধিনায়ক শ্রেয়স আইয়ার এবং কোচ গৌতম গম্ভীর সিরিজের শেষ ম্যাচে দলগত সমন্বয়ে কী পরিবর্তন আনেন, তার দিকেই তাকিয়ে এখন ক্রিকেটপ্রেমীরা।

title: ବାଣପୁରରେ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା: ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ ବିଲ ମଝିକୁ ଓଲଟିଲା ଦ୍ରୁତଗାମୀ କାର୍, ୫ ମଦ୍ୟପ ଯୁବକ…
description:
ବାଣପୁର, ୨୬।୬ (ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପ କୁମାର ସ୍ୱାଇଁ): ନାଚୁଣୀ ଥାନା ଅଧୀନ ଦେଓଗାଁ ଆଗୁଳଛକ ନିକଟ ବ୍ରିଜ୍‌ ପାଖରେ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଧରଣର ସଡ଼କ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଛି। ଏକ ଦ୍ରୁତଗାମୀ ଧଳା ରଙ୍ଗର ଟାଟା ଇଣ୍ଡିଗୋ କାର୍ (OD 02 R 9002) ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ ରାସ୍ତା କଡ଼ରେ ଥିବା ବିଲ ଭିତରକୁ ଓଲଟି ପଡ଼ିଛି। ଘଟଣାରୁ ପ୍ରକାଶ ଯେ, କାର୍‌ଟି ଆୟତପୁର ଛକ ଦେଇ ବାଣପୁର ଅଭିମୁଖେ ଅତି ଦ୍ରୁତ ଗତିରେ ଯାଉଥିଲା। ଏହି ସମୟରେ ଚାଳକ […]
The post ବାଣପୁରରେ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା: ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ ବିଲ ମଝିକୁ ଓଲଟିଲା ଦ୍ରୁତଗାମୀ କାର୍, ୫ ମଦ୍ୟପ ଯୁବକ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ବାଣପୁର, ୨୬।୬ (ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପ କୁମାର ସ୍ୱାଇଁ): ନାଚୁଣୀ ଥାନା ଅଧୀନ ଦେଓଗାଁ ଆଗୁଳଛକ ନିକଟ ବ୍ରିଜ୍‌ ପାଖରେ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ଧରଣର ସଡ଼କ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଛି। ଏକ ଦ୍ରୁତଗାମୀ ଧଳା ରଙ୍ଗର ଟାଟା ଇଣ୍ଡିଗୋ କାର୍ (OD 02 R 9002) ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ ରାସ୍ତା କଡ଼ରେ ଥିବା ବିଲ ଭିତରକୁ ଓଲଟି ପଡ଼ିଛି।
ଘଟଣାରୁ ପ୍ରକାଶ ଯେ, କାର୍‌ଟି ଆୟତପୁର ଛକ ଦେଇ ବାଣପୁର ଅଭିମୁଖେ ଅତି ଦ୍ରୁତ ଗତିରେ ଯାଉଥିଲା। ଏହି ସମୟରେ ଚାଳକ ଗାଡ଼ି ଉପରୁ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣ ହରାଇବାରୁ କାର୍‌ଟି ପ୍ରାୟ ୩ ପଲଟି ମାରି ବିଲ ମଝିକୁ ଚାଲିଯାଇଥିଲା। ଗାଡ଼ିଟି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ରୂପେ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ହୋଇଛି।
ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷଦର୍ଶୀଙ୍କ କହିବା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ସମୟରେ ଗାଡ଼ି ଭିତରେ ୫ ଜଣ ଯୁବକ ଥିଲେ। ସେମାନେ ପ୍ରାୟ ସମସ୍ତେ ଅତ୍ୟଧିକ ମଦ୍ୟପାନ କରି ମାତାଲ୍ ଅବସ୍ଥାରେ ଥିଲେ। ବିଲ ଭିତରେ ଗାଡ଼ି ଓଲଟିବା ପରେ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକେ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଧାଇଁ ଆସିଥିଲେ। ମାତ୍ର ଉଦ୍ଧାର ହେବା ପରେ ଉକ୍ତ ଯୁବକମାନେ ସେଠାରେ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିବା ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ଓଲଟା ଧମକଚମକ ଦେଇ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରୁ ଚମ୍ପଟ ମାରିଥିଲେ।
ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଖବର ପାଇ ଗମ୍ଭାରୀମୁଣ୍ଡା ପୋଲିସ ବିଟ୍ ହାଉସ ଅଧିକାରୀ ପ୍ରଫୁଲ୍ଲ କୁମାର ସାହୁ ସଦଳବଳେ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲେ। ପୋଲିସ ବିଲ ଭିତରୁ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ଗାଡ଼ିକୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରି ଜବତ କରିଛି। ଏହି ଭୟାବହ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାରେ ଆଶ୍ଚର୍ଯ୍ୟଜନକ ଭାବେ କୌଣସି ବ୍ୟକ୍ତି ଆହତ ହୋଇନାହାନ୍ତି ବୋଲି ପୋଲିସ ସୂଚନା ଦେଇଛି। ଗାଡ଼ି ନମ୍ବର ଆଧାରରେ ପୋଲିସ ଫେରାର୍ ଯୁବକମାନଙ୍କ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଅଧିକ ତଦନ୍ତ ଚଳାଇଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

title: भारत-UAE रक्षा साझेदारी: सेना प्रमुख जनरल उपेंद्र द्विवेदी और यूएई डिप्टी कमांडर ने सैन्य संबंधों पर की चर्चा
description: India UAE Relations: भारतीय सेना प्रमुख जनरल उपेंद्र द्विवेदी और यूएई के वरिष्ठ सैन्य अधिकारी के बीच हुई बैठक में रक्षा सहयोग, सैन्य आदान-प्रदान और क्षेत्रीय सुरक्षा को मजबूत बनाने पर अहम चर्चा हुई।
content:
General Dwivedi Discusses India-UAE Defence: भारत और संयुक्त अरब अमीरात (यूएई) के बीच रक्षा सहयोग को और मजबूत करने की दिशा में एक अहम कदम उठाया गया है। यूएई थल सेना के डिप्टी कमांडर ब्रिगेडियर जनरल स्टाफ मोहम्मद खमीस मोहम्मद अल-हसानी ने भारतीय सेना प्रमुख जनरल उपेंद्र द्विवेदी से मुलाकात कर द्विपक्षीय सैन्य संबंधों को नई गति देने पर चर्चा की।
इस उच्चस्तरीय बैठक में दोनों देशों के बीच सैन्य सहयोग बढ़ाने, पेशेवर स्तर पर आपसी आदान-प्रदान को मजबूत करने और रक्षा क्षेत्र में नए अवसर तलाशने पर विशेष जोर दिया गया। दोनों पक्षों ने संस्थागत संबंधों को सशक्त बनाने, आपसी विश्वास बढ़ाने तथा क्षेत्रीय सुरक्षा और स्थिरता के साझा उद्देश्य को आगे बढ़ाने की प्रतिबद्धता भी दोहराई। भारत और यूएई के बीच लगातार मजबूत होते रणनीतिक संबंधों के बीच यह बैठक रक्षा साझेदारी को और गहरा करने की दिशा में महत्वपूर्ण मानी जा रही है।
सेना प्रमुख से मिले UAE के डिप्टी कमांडर
इंडियन आर्मी के एडिशनल डायरेक्टरेट जनरल ऑफ पब्लिक इन्फॉर्मेशन (एडीजीपीआई) ने सोशल मीडिया प्लेटफॉर्म एक्‍स पर लिखा, &#8220;यूएई थल सेना के डिप्टी कमांडर ब्रिगेडियर जनरल स्टाफ मोहम्मद खमीस मोहम्मद अल-हसानी ने सेना प्रमुख जनरल उपेंद्र द्विवेदी से मुलाकात की। बैठक में भारत और यूएई के रक्षा संबंधों की लगातार बढ़ती मजबूती पर जोर दिया गया। दोनों पक्षों ने सैन्य सहयोग बढ़ाने, पेशेवर स्तर पर आपसी आदान-प्रदान को मजबूत करने और दोनों सेनाओं के बीच सहयोग के नए अवसर तलाशने पर चर्चा की।&#8221;
क्षेत्रीय सुरक्षा और स्थिरता के साझा लक्ष्य पर सहमति
तो वहीं एडीजीपीआई के मुताबिक, दोनों देशों ने संस्थागत संबंधों को मजबूत करने, आपसी भरोसा बढ़ाने और क्षेत्रीय सुरक्षा और स्थिरता के साझा लक्ष्य को आगे बढ़ाने की अपनी प्रतिबद्धता दोहराई। इस साल जनवरी में यूएई के राष्ट्रपति शेख मोहम्मद बिन जायद अल नाहयान भारत के आधिकारिक दौरे पर आए थे।
इस दौरान उन्होंने प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी के साथ कई अहम मुद्दों पर विस्तार से बातचीत की थी। दोनों नेताओं ने माना कि भारत और यूएई के बीच रक्षा और सुरक्षा सहयोग लगातार मजबूत हो रहे हैं और यह दोनों देशों की कॉम्प्रिहेंसिव स्ट्रेटेजिक पार्टनरशिप का एक महत्वपूर्ण हिस्सा है।
सैन्य सहयोग और पेशेवर आदान-प्रदान बढ़ाने पर जोर
दरअसल बैठक के बाद जारी संयुक्त बयान में कहा गया था, &#8220;दोनों नेताओं ने दोनों देशों की सेना, नौसेना और वायुसेना के प्रमुखों और वरिष्ठ कमांडरों के हालिया दौरों का स्वागत किया। उन्होंने दोनों देशों के बीच सफल सैन्य अभ्यासों की भी सराहना की। साथ ही, स्ट्रेटेजिक डिफेंस पार्टनरशिप की दिशा में &#8216;लेटर ऑफ इंटेंट&#8217; पर हस्ताक्षर होने का भी स्वागत किया।&#8221;
 ये भी पढ़ें &#8211;  पाकिस्तान की नई गीदड़भभकी! भारत के बांधों पर हमले की फिराक में PAK? पूर्व कानून मंत्री ने फिर उगला जहर
भारत-यूएई रणनीतिक रक्षा साझेदारी को नई मजबूती
बता दें कि जनरल उपेंद्र द्विवेदी ने भी जनवरी में आधिकारिक तौर पर यूएई का दौरा किया था। यह दौरा भारत की उन कोशिशों का हिस्सा था, जिनका मकसद मित्र देशों के साथ रक्षा सहयोग और सेनाओं के बीच रिश्तों को मजबूत करना है। अपने दौरे के दौरान जनरल द्विवेदी ने यूएई सशस्त्र बलों के वरिष्ठ अधिकारियों से मुलाकात की।
उन्हें यूएई की सेना की संरचना, जिम्मेदारियों और उसकी क्षमताओं के बारे में जानकारी दी गई। उन्होंने यूएई के कई अहम सैन्य प्रतिष्ठानों का दौरा किया और वहां तैनात अधिकारियों और जवानों से बातचीत की। इस दौरान भारत और यूएई के बीच लगातार मजबूत होते रक्षा संबंधों पर भी जोर दिया गया।

title: భారత్‌పై విజయం సాధించిన ఐర్లాండ్
description: India vs Ireland: అంతర్జాతీయ క్రికెట్‌లో ఒక భారీ సంచలనం నమోదైంది. వరుస విజయాలతో దూసుకుపోతున్న ప్రపంచ ఛాంపియన్ టీమిండియాకు పసికూన ఐర్లాండ్ గట్టి షాకిచ్చింది. బెల్‌ఫాస్ట్...
content:
India vs Ireland: అంతర్జాతీయ క్రికెట్‌లో ఒక భారీ సంచలనం నమోదైంది. వరుస విజయాలతో దూసుకుపోతున్న ప్రపంచ ఛాంపియన్ టీమిండియాకు పసికూన ఐర్లాండ్ గట్టి షాకిచ్చింది. బెల్‌ఫాస్ట్ వేదికగా జరిగిన మొదటి టీ20 పోరులో శ్రేయస్ అయ్యర్ సారథ్యంలోని భారత జట్టును 34 పరుగుల తేడాతో ఓడించి ఐర్లాండ్ సరికొత్త చరిత్ర సృష్టించింది. క్రికెట్ చరిత్రలో భారత్‌పై ఐర్లాండ్‌కు ఇదే మొట్టమొదటి విజయం కావడం విశేషం. ఐదుగురు స్టార్ ఆటగాళ్లు గాయాల వల్ల జట్టుకు దూరమైనప్పటికీ, ఐరిష్ జట్టు అద్భుత వీరవిహారం చేసి టీమిండియాను మట్టికరిపించింది. ఈ అపూర్వ విజయంతో మూడు మ్యాచ్‌ల ఈ టీ20 సిరీస్‌లో ఐర్లాండ్ 1-0తో ముందంజ వేసింది.







Read also: India vs Ireland T20: టీ20లో ఐర్లాండ్ 183 స్కోర్.. భారత్‌కు భారీ టార్గెట్







నిలబెట్టిన టకర్, డెలానీ భాగస్వామ్యం



ఈ మ్యాచ్‌లో టాస్ గెలిచిన భారత్ మొదట ఫీల్డింగ్ ఎంచుకోగా, బ్యాటింగ్‌కు దిగిన ఐర్లాండ్ జట్టు ఆరంభంలోనే వరుస వికెట్లు కోల్పోయి ఇబ్బందుల్లో పడింది. ఆ దశలో కెప్టెన్ లోర్కాన్ టకర్ (36 బంతుల్లో 50), గారెత్ డెలానీ (32 బంతుల్లో 49) బాధ్యతాయుతమైన ఇన్నింగ్స్‌లతో జట్టును సంక్షోభం నుంచి గట్టెక్కించారు. వీరిద్దరూ అద్భుత భాగస్వామ్యంతో ఇన్నింగ్స్‌ను నిర్మించారు. చివర్లో జార్జ్ డాక్రెల్ (10 బంతుల్లో 19) మెరుపులు మెరిపించడంతో ఐర్లాండ్ జట్టు నిర్ణీత 20 ఓవర్లలో 9 వికెట్లు కోల్పోయి 182 పరుగుల భారీ స్కోరును బోర్డుపై ఉంచింది. భారత బౌలర్లలో హర్షిత్ రాణా 3 వికెట్లతో, అర్ష్‌దీప్ సింగ్ 2 వికెట్లతో మెరిసినా.. ప్రసిద్ధ్ కృష్ణ 4 ఓవర్లలో 57 పరుగులు ఇచ్చుకోవడం జట్టును దెబ్బతీసింది.



India vs Ireland: అభిషేక్ శర్మ విధ్వంసం.. ఆపై కుప్పకూలిన బ్యాటింగ్




మలుపు తిప్పిన వికెట్: 183 పరుగుల క్లిష్టమైన లక్ష్యంతో బరిలోకి దిగిన భారత్‌కు యువ ఓపెనర్ అభిషేక్ శర్మ (20 బంతుల్లో 50; 7 ఫోర్లు, 2 సిక్సర్లు) ఆకాశమే హద్దుగా చెలరేగుతూ వీరవిహారం చేశాడు. కేవలం 20 బంతుల్లోనే హాఫ్ సెంచరీ బాది భారత్‌కు సాలిడ్ స్టార్ట్ ఇచ్చాడు. అయితే, అతడు అవుటైన వెంటనే టీమిండియా బ్యాటింగ్ లైనప్ పూర్తిగా గాడి తప్పింది.




పేకమేడలా కూలిన మిడిలార్డర్



అభిషేక్ నిష్క్రమణ తర్వాత వచ్చిన సంజూ శాంసన్ (5), ఇషాన్ కిషన్ (1), కెప్టెన్ శ్రేయస్ అయ్యర్ (3) ఘోరంగా నిరాశపరిచారు. తిలక్ వర్మ (19), శివమ్ దూబే (25) కాసేపు క్రీజులో నిలిచి పోరాడే ప్రయత్నం చేసినప్పటికీ లాభం లేకపోయింది. ఐర్లాండ్ బౌలర్లు క్రమం తప్పకుండా వికెట్లు తీస్తూ భారత్‌ను ఒత్తిడిలోకి నెట్టారు. ఐరిష్ బౌలర్లలో మాట్ హొలార్డ్, మాథ్యూ హంఫ్రీస్ చెరో 3 వికెట్లతో భారత్ పతనాన్ని శాసించారు. దీనితో భారత జట్టు 18.5 ఓవర్లలో కేవలం 148 పరుగులకే ఆలౌట్ అయి పరాజయాన్ని చవిచూసింది.

title: Are Europe’s heat waves deadlier than American gun violence? Kind of—and one of the hottest summers on record is making it worse
description: Heat has killed 200,000 Europeans in four years. The WHO calls it a health emergency.
content:
You’ve probably seen it by now. A chart, passed around on social media with the kind of grim satisfaction that only statistics can produce: more Europeans die each year from summer heat than Americans die from gun violence. The implication cuts both ways—Europe’s lack of air conditioning is deadlier than America’s lack of gun control—and it has been lighting up feeds across the political spectrum ever since.



Turns out, it’s mostly true. And this summer is making it impossible to ignore.


This semi-true graph is picking up steam online.Hannah Ritchie’s By the Numbers Substack



Europe is currently in the grip of its second major heat emergency in two months. The UK Met Office and the World Meteorological Organization have put an 86% probability on at least one year between now and 2030 breaking 2024’s record as the hottest ever measured—with 2027 the most likely candidate as a developing El Niño peaks. In the meantime, 2026 is already tracking as one of the four warmest years on record, the fourth consecutive year to exceed 1.4°C above pre-industrial levels. 



It’ll be a hot summer for sure



Temperatures in parts of France have topped 108°F, while Spain logged highs above 113°F in the south. The UK, Germany, France, Spain, Switzerland, and Luxembourg have all issued the highest-level red heat alerts. At least 40 people have drowned since last Thursday, with French Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu publicly linking the deaths to soaring temperatures as people wade into unsupervised rivers and lakes seeking relief. So far, at least 18 more have died from direct heat causes in France alone—among them two toddlers found unresponsive in a hot car in the southeastern town of Carpentras, where temperatures exceeded 102°F that afternoon, and three elderly people between the ages of 80 and 95 who died near Bordeaux over the weekend.



And summer has barely started.



A developing El Niño is reshaping atmospheric circulation across Europe, with some models suggesting it could become the strongest El Niño in modern history—what meteorologists are informally calling a “Super El Niño” heading into 2027. The current heat dome is being driven by a ridge of high pressure over western Europe, reinforced by El Niño-driven jet stream shifts that are allowing hot Saharan air to push further north and linger longer than it should. While scientists caution that El Niño’s direct role in European summer heat is real, it pales to human-caused climate change, which is the dominant structural driver responsible for pushing global temperatures up roughly 1.4°C above pre-industrial levels across each of the last four years running. 



Either way, Europe is the world’s fastest-warming continent, heating at roughly twice the global average, on infrastructure built for a climate that no longer exists. Which brings us back to that statistic, and what it actually shows when you dig into the numbers.


Hannah Ritchie’s By the Numbers Substack



In 2025, heat waves killed some 24,400 people across Europe, with 16,500 of those deaths attributed directly to climate change. The year before, more than 62,700 Europeans died of heat-related causes. Gun deaths in the U.S., by comparison, totaled 44,447 in 2024 according to the CDC, before falling in 2025 to roughly 38,700. By the raw numbers, it’s not close. The viral stat, for once, is sort of right—but Hannah Ritchie, a data scientist and author of the Substack By the Numbers, looked at the viral chart and found that while the headline survives, the methodology underneath it does not fully hold up. “The chart has several issues,” she wrote.



The two numbers are produced using fundamentally different methods. The European heat death figures are based on modeled “excess deaths”—a standard epidemiological approach that tries to capture everyone who died earlier than they would have in cooler conditions, including from cardiovascular disease, stroke, and respiratory failure, which casts a wide net. “But the US number,” Ritchie wrote, “isn’t based on this type of modeling; it’s based on heat deaths recorded on death certificates.” That’s a far narrower count which only captures cases where a physician specifically wrote heat as the cause of death. The result is that the two figures being compared are not measuring the same thing. “If you used death certificate figures for Europe,” Ritchie wrote, “they’d be far lower.”



There’s a second problem: The original viral chart uses European Union figures for gun deaths, but a broader geographic definition of Europe—including the UK, Switzerland, Norway, Serbia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, and Montenegro—for heat deaths. More Europe means more heat deaths. 



Ritchie instead used excess death modeling for the U.S. as well, drawing on a study estimating roughly 6,100 to 6,500 heat-related American deaths per year between 2000 and 2020. She averaged Europe’s 2022 through 2024 figures—67,873; 50,798; and 62,775, for an annual average of roughly 60,500—to avoid anchoring to any single catastrophic year. And she produced two versions: one using EU-27 figures consistently throughout, and one using the broader 32-country European definition for both measures. Her conclusion: “It doesn’t change the conclusions much.” The core claim mostly holds in absolute terms. But then comes the adjustment the viral chart skips entirely: when Ritchie controls for population, expressing both figures as rates per 100,000 people, the picture shifts. “Gun deaths in the US are now slightly larger than European heat death rates,” she wrote. 


Hannah Ritchie’s By the Numbers Substack



“I think this comparison is a bit silly,” she wrote, “but sympathize with the overall sentiment.” Fewer gun deaths in America would not make European heat deaths acceptable, or vice versa. What the data is actually showing, she argued, is something simpler: status quo bias. “Both places take the status quo as a given”—a high-mortality situation in one domain that each society would never accept in another. Europe would never absorb tens of thousands of annual gun deaths without demanding legislative action. America would never absorb tens of thousands of annual heat deaths without demanding someone install a thermostat.



A lack of infrastructure



Only about 20% of European homes have air conditioning, compared to roughly 90% of U.S. households, according to the International Energy Agency. Northern European housing stock was built to retain warmth, not expel it. The continent never built out cooling infrastructure at scale because, for most of its modern history, it didn’t need to. Extreme weather events including heat waves cost European economies nearly $50 billion last year alone. Meanwhile, as a Johns Hopkins analysis found, firearm-related homicide and suicide rates for Americans under 25 are nearly 486 times higher than in the UK.



These are both wealthy societies paying enormous and entirely preventable death tolls that they have collectively chosen to absorb rather than address. With an 86% chance that the coming years bring an even more punishing heat record, and a Super El Niño potentially still building toward its peak, it’s like how Ritchie put it: “Things don’t have to be this bad. It’s a choice.”
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: US Warns Europe of 100% US Tariffs Over Digital Tax Plans
description: President Trump has issued a strong warning against European nations contemplating new taxes on American tech companies, specifically a Digital Services Tax.
content: President Donald Trump  has threatened sweeping trade retaliation against European countries considering new taxes on US technology firms, warning that any nation implementing such measures would face steep tariffs on exports to the United States.In a post on Truth Social, Trump said several European governments are “discussing the imminent implementation of a Digital Services Tax on American companies,” adding that some are “close to actually doing this.”He warned that any country that moves ahead with such a tax would immediately face a 100% tariff on all goods shipped to the United States, describing the measure as automatic and non-negotiable.Trump also said the proposed tariffs would override existing trade agreements, whether already signed or still under negotiation.The remarks escalate long-running tensions between Washington and European capitals over digital taxation policies, which US officials have previously argued unfairly target major American tech firms.European governments have defended digital services taxes as a way to ensure multinational technology companies pay what they describe as a fair share of revenue in countries where they operate but may not be physically headquartered.Trump’s warning signals a potential sharp escalation in transatlantic trade friction if the proposals move forward, with the US threatening across-the-board tariffs affecting a wide range of imported goods.

title: MBA faces crisis in AI era, demands urgent rethink from business schools
description: For a degree that teaches disruption, it is quite remarkable how little the traditional MBA model has changed in the 118 years since its inception at Harvard. In fact, one could argue that the MBA has done a remarkable job of avoiding disruption. Over these years, there have probably been only five major innovations—the introduction of the case method at Harvard in 1924, the launch of the executive MBA at Chicago Booth in 1943, the advent of the quantitative MBA in the 1950s, the birth of the one-year MBA at INSEAD in 1959, and the launch of the stackable online MBA in the 2010s.Apart from these, the MBA has remained remarkably resilient, seemingly immune to changes in the world around it. It has endured the dot-com bust, the global meltdown in 2008, and the global pandemic. At various points, commentators have sounded the death knell for the MBA, convinced that it is losing its sheen and value. Yet, it continues with a product that supporters argue has stood the test of time, while detractors dismiss it as being out of touch with reality.Today, we are once again at a crossroads as we confront AI and its impact on jobs. If I were to pose the question in the title of this essay to an MBA class, I would expect about 20% to say “Yes”, about 30% to say “No”, and 50% to sit on the fence with a typical “It depends” or “Maybe”. This essay is aimed at these “Maybes”. I argue that over the last 100-plus years, the MBA has survived change but has barely evolved. The time is ripe for a radical rethink.In India, the IIMs were founded in the 1960s, driven by the urge to create world-class management institutions. IIM Ahmedabad partnered with Harvard, and IIM Calcutta with MIT Sloan. The aim was to move away from the rigidities of the traditional university system and enable these institutions to pursue high-quality research and pedagogy.Sixty-plus years later, one could argue that while we have got the pedagogy right, we continue to lag behind global b-schools in creating new knowledge. This may have been acceptable when changes in the global environment were slow or predictable. That is no longer the case. AI has transformed the career landscape, accelerating the emergence of non-linear pathways.Also Read: Why MBA education in the age of AI must move beyond analysis for leadershipDisruptions abound—driven by entrepreneurs who challenge the status quo, question traditional business models, and take on well-established incumbents. India is at the forefront of these disruptions. Shouldn’t we be driving more research in this area? Shouldn’t we be creating new knowledge and disseminating it in the classroom? In fact, shouldn’t we be practicing what we teach and disrupting the way MBAs are designed and structured?Instead, the system has spawned innumerable PGDM and MBA programmes, most of them virtually identical except for placement outcomes, campus infrastructure, and brand name. We are becoming victims of the very rigidity we once sought to escape.To be sure, there is innovation at the margins. Most b-schools today include AI and analytics as core components of their curriculum. Courses on e-commerce, digital marketing, and data science are widely offered to ensure that graduates are tech-literate. Several institutions are also experimenting with pedagogical approaches such as simulations, flipped classrooms, and role-plays.Yet, the core architecture remains largely unchanged. There have been few attempts to challenge the traditional two-year format aimed at students with limited work experience. Even fewer have questioned the functional silos in which students specialise—finance, marketing, operations, OB/HR, and others. Governed by regulations and rankings, incentives are aligned towards consistency and incremental change.This creates a widening gap between what recruiters need from fresh graduates and what institutions are able to deliver.Also Read: AI readiness in Indian business schools beyond the signallingAs institutions around the world grapple with a commoditised offering, value-conscious students, and increasingly sceptical recruiters, there is a clear need for a more agile MBA—one that not only adapts to changing market needs but anticipates them. Institutions must adopt a growth mindset: challenging long-held assumptions, listening closely to recruiters and students, experimenting even at the risk of failure, and executing at a far greater pace and scale. AI presents an opportunity to make this shift.The widespread adoption of AI across organisations will require graduates who are skilled in using these tools. However, the ability to simply use AI is unlikely to create significant value. A study in the US by neuroscientist and entrepreneur Vivienne Ming found that students performed poorly on long-term prediction tasks without AI, with any LLM outperforming them.More strikingly, when students were allowed to use an LLM, over 90% simply copied responses, performing no better than the tool itself. However, about 10% demonstrated superior outcomes by thinking critically and engaging with the output.It is this ability—to think, reason, and solve ill-defined problems—that will endure. The market is ready for an agile MBA that challenges the status quo and builds career-ready skills for a future that will be increasingly shaped by AI.

title: ଦୁବାଇରେ ହଠାତ ବାଜିଲା ସାଇରନ୍‌! ମିସାଇଲ୍‌ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ଚେତାବନୀ,  ଖେଳିଗଲା ଆତଙ୍କ
description:
ଦୁବାଇ,୨୬।୬: ସଂଯୁକ୍ତ ଆରବ ଏମିରେଟ୍ସ (UAE) କର୍ତ୍ତୃପକ୍ଷଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଦିନ ଦୁବାଇ ପାଇଁ ଏକ ମିସାଇଲ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ସତର୍କ ସୂଚନା (Alert) ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏହାକୁ ନେଇ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ କିଛି ସମୟ ପାଇଁ ଭୟର ବାତାବରଣ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଥିଲା। ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ସମୟ ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟା ୫:୧୫ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଏହି ଚେତାବନୀର ପ୍ରକୃତ କାରଣ ଏଯାବତ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇପାରିନାହିଁ। ଆନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଖବରଦାତା ସଂସ୍ଥା ’ଏପି’ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ୟୁଏଇର ଗୃହ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ହଠାତସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକଙ୍କ […]
The post ଦୁବାଇରେ ହଠାତ ବାଜିଲା ସାଇରନ୍‌! ମିସାଇଲ୍‌ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ଚେତାବନୀ,  ଖେଳିଗଲା ଆତଙ୍କ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଦୁବାଇ,୨୬।୬: ସଂଯୁକ୍ତ ଆରବ ଏମିରେଟ୍ସ (UAE) କର୍ତ୍ତୃପକ୍ଷଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଦିନ ଦୁବାଇ ପାଇଁ ଏକ ମିସାଇଲ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ସତର୍କ ସୂଚନା (Alert) ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏହାକୁ ନେଇ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ କିଛି ସମୟ ପାଇଁ ଭୟର ବାତାବରଣ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଥିଲା। ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ସମୟ ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟା ୫:୧୫ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଏହି ଚେତାବନୀର ପ୍ରକୃତ କାରଣ ଏଯାବତ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇପାରିନାହିଁ।


ଆନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ଖବରଦାତା ସଂସ୍ଥା ’ଏପି’ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ୟୁଏଇର ଗୃହ ମନ୍ତ୍ରଣାଳୟ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ହଠାତସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ମୋବାଇଲ ଫୋନକୁ ମିସାଇଲ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ସମ୍ପର୍କିତ ଏକ ଜରୁରୀକାଳୀନ ସତର୍କ ସନ୍ଦେଶ ପଠାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଇରାନ ସହିତ ଚାଲିଥିବା ସାମ୍ପ୍ରତିକ ତିକ୍ତତା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଏହା ପ୍ରଥମ ଥର ପାଇଁ ଏଭଳି ଏକ ଆଲର୍ଟ ଥିଲା, ଯାହା ଦୁବାଇବାସୀଙ୍କୁ ଚକିତ ଓ ସ୍ତବ୍ଧ କରିଦେଇଥିଲା।ଏହି ଆଲର୍ଟ ଜାରି ହେବାର ମାତ୍ର କିଛି ମିନିଟ ପରେ କର୍ତ୍ତୃପକ୍ଷ କୌଣସି ବିସ୍ତୃତ ସୂଚନା ନ ଦେଇ ସବୁକିଛି ସ୍ବାଭାବିକ ଥିବା ଅର୍ଥାତ ‘ଅଲ କ୍ଲିୟର’ର ସଙ୍କେତ ଦେଇଥିଲେ।

କହିରଖୁଛୁ, ଗୁରୁବାର ଓମାନ ଉପକୂଳ ନିକଟରେ ଏକ ତେଲ ଟାଙ୍କର ଉପରେ ଡ୍ରୋନ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା, ଯାହା ପଛରେ ଇରାନ ଥିବା ସନ୍ଦେହ କରାଯାଉଛି। ହର୍ମୁଜ ଉପରେ ନିଜର ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣକୁ ନେଇ ଇରାନ କ୍ରମାଗତ ଭାବେ ଏହି ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ଏବଂ ଆମେରିକାକୁ ଚ୍ୟାଲେଞ୍ଜ କରୁଛି। ଅପରପକ୍ଷେ ଇରାନ ଯୁଦ୍ଧକୁ ଏଡ଼ାଇବା ପାଇଁ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଏକ ମଧ୍ୟବର୍ତ୍ତୀକାଳୀନ ଚୁକ୍ତି ମଧ୍ୟ ବଳବତ୍ତର ରହିଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ଦୁବାଇରେ ହଠାତ ବାଜିଲା ସାଇରନ୍‌! ମିସାଇଲ୍‌ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ଚେତାବନୀ,  ଖେଳିଗଲା ଆତଙ୍କ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Charli XCX on her “mini-break” in Paris with Madonna: “I found it very inspiring to hang out with her”
description:
The two singers ended speculation over a possible feud by attending a fashion show together last week
The post Charli XCX on her “mini-break” in Paris with Madonna: “I found it very inspiring to hang out with her” appeared first on NME.
content:
Charli XCX has opened up about her relationship with Madonna, after the pair appeared to end speculation of a feud by partying together in Paris.

READ MORE: The Big Read – Madonna: ”People pick on me. That’s just the way it is”

Charli’s recent single ‘Rock Music’, taken from her upcoming album ‘Music, Fashion, Film’, caused debate over its bold declaration: “I think the dancefloor is dead, so now we’re making rock music”.
The lyric arrived as Madonna was gearing up to release ‘Confessions II’, the long-anticipated sequel to 2005’s ‘Confessions On A Dance Floor’. She later appeared to respond on Instagram, writing: “If your Dance floor feels dead, maybe you’re playing the wrong music.”
However, the pair were spotted together in Paris in the last week, bringing an apparent end to speculation of tension between the two pop stars.
Now, Charli has given an interview to Nick Grimshaw on BBC 6 Music, where she discussed her recent “mini-break” with Madonna.
“Me and Madonna had a mini break together, essentially is what happened. We went to Paris and we just couldn’t stop hanging out with each other. And it was fab!” Charli said.

  










View this post on Instagram

























“We’ve met before in the past but I don’t know that she knows that – but we were put together on a group text just a couple of weeks ago, which is obviously insane.”
Charli went on to explain that the pair then ended up throwing parties together in the French capital.
“So we did – but then we actually accidentally threw two parties,” she said. “She’s very like… I mean, she’s so cool. And she is so interested in really talking about the music that she makes, and how and why, and I found it very inspiring to hang out with her.”
Charli also admitted that she was not necessarily a Madonna fan when she was younger, but came to appreciate her work more deeply as she grew older.
“I think when I became like a bit more interested in how music is art and artful – I think that’s when I began my Madonna time,” she said. “My first big song that I fell in love with of hers was ‘Hollywood’. That song really hit me in a way.”
The two artists were seated next to one another at the Saint Laurent menswear spring/summer 2027 fashion show on June 23, and were later seen smoking and chatting with other stars in attendance, including actors Connor Storrie and Debi Mazar.
At the end of the night, the two danced together to Madonna’s hits, like ‘Thief of Hearts’ and ‘Hung Up’, from behind the DJ booth at the after-party.

  










View this post on Instagram

























Charli has since clarified that ‘Rock Music’ was not intended as a literal dismissal of dance music. “That lyric is very much about my relationship with ‘Brat’, and my personal experience with that album,” she explained. “Dance music is in an incredible place.”
She also pushed back on the idea that her next album is a straightforward rock record, saying: “I know that there’s been a lot of conversation around me making a rock album, which is something that I never said.”
‘Music, Fashion, Film’ is set for release on July 24, and features a black-and-white cover shot by Aidan Zamiri with John Cale, Marc Jacobs and Martin Scorsese. You can pre-order it here.
Elsewhere, Charli recently spoke candidly about her mental health, saying: “I’m in the worst place mentally that I’ve been in my life.”
She added that she was “struggling” in the wake of the ‘Brat’ era, while also moving into a new creative chapter across music, fashion and film.
She will return to the stage to make her headline debut at Reading & Leeds in August, topping the festival bill alongside Fontaines D.C., Raye, Florence + The Machine, Dave and Chase & Status. Visit here for tickets.
Madonna’s ‘Confessions II’, meanwhile, will be out on July 3 and you can pre-order it here.

Ars Live: What's the latest in the aftermath of the New Glenn catastrophe?
description: Join us on the livestream at 1 pm ET and ask questions about the aftermath of New Glenn.
content:
Nearly a month has passed since the New Glenn rocket exploded on its launch pad in Florida, creating a massive fireball. It was likely the largest ever rocket explosion at the historic Florida spaceport, and we are still dealing with its implications today.
The rocket's explosion took out its only launch pad, LC-36A. So even if Blue Origin can quickly diagnose the cause of the failure, it has nowhere to launch the New Glenn rocket from. Company officials, including founder Jeff Bezos, have said the vehicle will return to flight at LC-36A before the end of this year, though there is widespread skepticism about that timeline.
Meanwhile, we have more questions than answers about a rocket that had become increasingly central to the needs of NASA and commercial customers. What does this failure mean for the Artemis Program to land humans on the Moon? What do we know about the timing of Artemis III and the lunar landing mission, Artemis IV? What about the Moon base?Read full article

title: Suspected Pak intruder nabbed at LoC in Poonch
description:
Rajouri, June 26: A suspected intruder has been nabbed on Line of Control (LoC) in Poonch sector of Jammu and Kashmir after he was trying to infiltrate from the area.
He has initially been identified as 26-year-old Mohammad Sajjad, son of Mohammad Rafiq and a resident of Polas village, Abbaspur district in PoJK.
Official sources said that he was reportedly apprehended by the Indian Army during an alleged infiltration attempt in the Gulpur area of Poonch sector and has been shifted to local army camp with joint teams of forces are questioning him.

title: IND vs IRE 1st T20I: Shreyas Iyer's captaincy stint starts with a humiliating 34-run loss to Ireland
description: Shreyas Iyer's captaincy stint starts on a disappointing note as India suffered a humbling 34-run loss to Ireland in the first T20I of the 3-match series.
content: Ireland inflicted a 34-run loss on India in the first T20I of the 3-match series, held at Stomfront in Belfast on Friday. Batting first, Ireland posted a challenging total of 182/9 in 20 overs. Lorcan Tucker emerged as the standout performer with the bat with a 50-run knock. In reply, India bundled out at 148 in 18.5 overs. Matthew Hollard was the most successful with the ball as he picked up three wickets and gave away just 28 runs in his four overs. This result will go down in history as this was the first time Ireland have beaten India in any format of the sport.(More to follow...)
